##### B4. Optimistic Updates
```tsx
// ✅ Optimistic UI — بۆ add to cart
function AddToCartButton({ product }) {
  const addItem = useCartStore(s => s.addItem);
  const { toast } = useToast();
  
  const handleAdd = () => {
    // 1. ✅ UI فەورەن update بکە (optimistic)
    addItem(product, 1);
    
    // 2. ✅ Toast نیشان بدە
    toast({ title: '✅ زیادکرا بۆ سەبەتە', description: product.name });
    
    // 3. ئەگەر server sync پێویستە → لە background بکە
    // ئەگەر هەڵە دا → rollback + error toast
  };
  
  return <button onClick={handleAdd}>زیاد بکە</button>;
}

// ✅ Optimistic UI — بۆ wishlist toggle
function WishlistButton({ productId }) {
  const [isWished, setIsWished] = useState(false);
  
  const toggle = async () => {
    setIsWished(prev => !prev);  // ✅ Optimistic: فەورەن بیگۆڕە
    
    try {
      if (isWished) {
        await supabase.from('wishlist').delete().eq('product_id', productId);
      } else {
        await supabase.from('wishlist').insert({ product_id: productId });
      }
    } catch {
      setIsWished(prev => !prev);  // ❌ Rollback ئەگەر هەڵە دا
      toast({ title: 'هەڵەیەک ڕوویدا', variant: 'destructive' });
    }
  };
}
```
- ئایا add to cart فەورەن UI update دەکات (optimistic)؟
- ئایا wishlist toggle فەورەنە؟
- ئایا rollback mechanism هەیە بۆ failed optimistic updates؟

#### C. Navigation & Wayfinding — ڕاگەیاندنی شوێن

##### C1. Breadcrumbs
```tsx
// ✅ Breadcrumb component
function Breadcrumb({ items }: { items: { label: string; href: string }[] }) {
  return (
    <nav aria-label="breadcrumb" className="mb-4">
      <ol className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500">
        {items.map((item, i) => (
          <li key={item.href} className="flex items-center gap-2">
            {i > 0 && <ChevronLeft className="h-3 w-3 rtl:rotate-180" />}
            {i === items.length - 1 ? (
              <span aria-current="page" className="text-gray-900 font-medium">
                {item.label}
              </span>
            ) : (
              <Link href={item.href} className="hover:text-gray-900">
                {item.label}
              </Link>
            )}
          </li>
        ))}
      </ol>
    </nav>
  );
}
```
- ئایا breadcrumb بۆ product pages, category pages هەیە؟
- ئایا breadcrumb accessible ـە (`aria-label`, `aria-current`)؟

##### C2. Active Navigation State
```tsx
// ✅ Active link نیشانکردن
'use client';
import { usePathname } from 'next/navigation';

function NavLink({ href, children }) {
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const isActive = pathname === href || pathname.startsWith(href + '/');
  
  return (
    <Link
      href={href}
      className={cn(
        'px-3 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors',
        isActive
          ? 'bg-primary text-white font-medium'
          : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100'
      )}
      aria-current={isActive ? 'page' : undefined}
    >
      {children}
    </Link>
  );
}
```
- ئایا active state بۆ navigation links هەیە؟
- ئایا `aria-current="page"` بۆ active link هەیە؟

#### D. Forms & Input — فۆرم و داخلکردن

##### D1. Form UX Best Practices
```tsx
// ✅ Form بە inline validation
function ContactForm() {
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  
  return (
    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
      {/* ✅ Label + Input + Error */}
      <div>
        <label htmlFor="email">ئیمەیل</label>
        <input
          id="email"
          type="email"
          autoComplete="email"
          inputMode="email"           // ✅ مۆبایل: keyboard ـی ئیمەیل
          required
          aria-invalid={!!errors.email}
          aria-describedby="email-error"
        />
        {errors.email && <p id="email-error" className="text-red-500 text-sm">{errors.email}</p>}
      </div>
      
      {/* ✅ Phone number — Kurdish format */}
      <div>
        <label htmlFor="phone">ژمارەی مۆبایل</label>
        <input
          id="phone"
          type="tel"
          inputMode="tel"              // ✅ keyboard ـی ژمارە
          autoComplete="tel"
          placeholder="07xx xxx xxxx"
          dir="ltr"                    // ✅ ژمارەکان LTR ـن
        />
      </div>
      
      {/* ✅ Submit بە loading state */}
      <button type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting}>
        {isSubmitting ? 'ناردن...' : 'ناردن'}
      </button>
    </form>
  );
}
```

| Input Type | `type` | `inputMode` | `autoComplete` |
|-----------|--------|-------------|---------------|
| ئیمەیل | `email` | `email` | `email` |
| وشەی نهێنی | `password` | — | `current-password` |
| ژمارەی مۆبایل | `tel` | `tel` | `tel` |
| ناو | `text` | `text` | `name` |
| ناونیشان | `text` | `text` | `street-address` |
| شار | `text` | `text` | `address-level2` |
| کۆدی پۆستی | `text` | `numeric` | `postal-code` |
| ژمارەی کارت | `text` | `numeric` | `cc-number` |

- ئایا `inputMode` بەکارهاتووە بۆ keyboard ـی مناسب لە مۆبایل؟
- ئایا `autoComplete` بەکارهاتووە بۆ browser autofill؟
- ئایا double submit prevention هەیە (button disabled while submitting)؟
- ئایا inline validation فیدباک دەدات بە real-time؟

#### E. Dark Mode — ڕەنگی تاریک

##### E1. Theme System
```tsx
// ✅ Theme implementation لە NexPOS — contexts/preferences.tsx
type Theme = 'dark' | 'light' | 'auto';

function PreferencesProvider({ children, initialTheme }) {
  const [theme, setTheme] = useState<Theme>(initialTheme ?? 'auto');
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const isDark = theme === 'dark' || 
      (theme === 'auto' && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
    
    document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', isDark);
  }, [theme]);
  
  // ...
}
```
```css
/* ✅ Tailwind dark mode classes */
.bg-white { background: white; }
.dark .bg-white { background: #111827; }  /* dark:bg-gray-900 */

/* ✅ Custom properties بۆ semantic colors */
:root {
  --color-bg: white;
  --color-text: #111827;
  --color-muted: #6B7280;
}
.dark {
  --color-bg: #111827;
  --color-text: #F9FAFB;
  --color-muted: #9CA3AF;
}
```
- ئایا dark mode implement کراوە؟
- ئایا theme switching smooth ـە بەبێ flash؟
- ئایا `auto` option هەیە (system preference)؟
- ئایا هەموو UI elements لە dark mode دا باش دەردەکەون؟
- ⚠️ ئایا images/illustrations بۆ dark mode adapted ـن؟

#### F. Micro-interactions & Feedback

##### F1. Toast Notification System
```tsx
// ✅ Toast system
function useToast() {
  const [toasts, setToasts] = useState<Toast[]>([]);
  
  const toast = ({ title, description, variant = 'default', duration = 4000 }) => {
    const id = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);
    setToasts(prev => [...prev, { id, title, description, variant }]);
    setTimeout(() => setToasts(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id)), duration);
  };
  
  return { toast, toasts };
}

// نموونەی بەکارهێنان:
toast({ title: '✅ زیادکرا بۆ سەبەتە', description: 'iPhone 16 Pro' });
toast({ title: '❌ هەڵە', description: 'تکایە دووبارە هەوڵبدە', variant: 'destructive' });
```
- ئایا toast/notification system هەیە؟
- ئایا variants هەن (success, error, warning, info)؟
- ئایا auto-dismiss هەیە (4-6 seconds)؟
- ئایا toasts accessible ـن (`role="status"`, `aria-live="polite"`)؟

##### F2. Hover & Transition Patterns
```css
/* ✅ Smooth transitions */
.btn { transition: all 200ms ease-in-out; }
.card { transition: transform 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; }
.card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }

/* ❌ Instant — بەبێ transition */
.card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }  /* jarring */

/* ✅ Reduced motion */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .card { transition: none; }
  .card:hover { transform: none; }
}
```
- ئایا transitions smooth ـن (150-300ms)؟
- ئایا hover states بۆ buttons, cards, links هەن؟
- ئایا `prefers-reduced-motion` respect کراوە؟

#### G. Kurdish UI Patterns — ئەزموونی بەکارهێنەری کوردی

##### G1. Kurdish Typography
```css
/* ✅ فۆنتی کوردی سۆرانی — Noto Sans Arabic + Kurdish support */
@font-face {
  font-family: 'NotoKurdish';
  src: url('/fonts/NotoSansArabic-Variable.woff2') format('woff2');
  font-display: swap;           /* ✅ FOUT بەجیاتی FOIT */
  unicode-range: U+0600-06FF;   /* Arabic/Kurdish range */
}

body {
  font-family: 'NotoKurdish', 'Noto Sans Arabic', 'Arial', sans-serif;
  line-height: 1.8;             /* ✅ line-height ـی زیاتر بۆ خوێندنەوەی باشتری دەقی کوردی */
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;       /* ✅ spacing ـی کەمەوە بۆ وشەی کوردی */
}
```

##### G2. Kurdish Number Formatting
```typescript
// ✅ ١٢٣٤ بەجیاتی 1234 بۆ زمانی کوردی
function formatKurdishNumber(num: number, locale: string): string {
  if (locale === 'ckb' || locale === 'ar') {
    return num.toLocaleString('ar-u-nu-arab');  // ١٬٢٣٤
  }
  return num.toLocaleString('en');  // 1,234
}

// ✅ نرخ بەپێی locale
function formatPrice(amount: number, currency: string, locale: string): string {
  const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat(locale === 'ckb' ? 'ar-IQ' : locale, {
    style: 'currency',
    currency,
    minimumFractionDigits: currency === 'IQD' ? 0 : 2,
  }).format(amount);
  
  return formatted;
}
// formatPrice(25000, 'IQD', 'ckb') → "٢٥٬٠٠٠ د.ع.‏"
// formatPrice(19.99, 'USD', 'en') → "$19.99"
```

##### G3. Kurdish Date Formatting
```typescript
// ✅ بەرواری کوردی
function formatKurdishDate(date: Date | string, locale: string): string {
  const d = new Date(date);
  
  if (locale === 'ckb') {
    return d.toLocaleDateString('ckb-IQ', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric',
    });
    // → "٤ی نیسانی ٢٠٢٦"
  }
  
  return d.toLocaleDateString(locale);
}
```
- ئایا ژمارەکان بەپێی locale format دەکرێن؟ (٢٥٬٠٠٠ vs 25,000)
- ئایا بەروار بەپێی locale format دەکرێت؟
- ئایا نرخ بەپێی currency format دەکرێت؟ (IQD بەبێ دەنگی دواین)

---

### 🏗️ ٧. پشکنینی ئارکیتێکچەر (Architecture) — سیستەمی بەهێز

#### A. Next.js App Router Architecture — ساختاری ڕووتەکان

##### A1. Route Group Strategy
```
app/
├── (store)/              # 🛒 Route group — public storefront
│   ├── layout.tsx        #    Navbar + Footer + Providers
│   ├── page.tsx          #    Homepage (/)
│   ├── loading.tsx       #    Global loading skeleton
│   ├── products/         #    /products, /products/[slug]
│   ├── cart/             #    /cart
│   ├── checkout/         #    /checkout (protected)
│   ├── orders/           #    /orders (protected)
│   ├── wishlist/         #    /wishlist (protected)
│   ├── settings/         #    /settings (protected)
│   ├── contact/          #    /contact
│   ├── privacy/          #    /privacy
│   └── terms/            #    /terms
│
├── (auth)/               # 🔐 Route group — auth pages
│   ├── layout.tsx        #    Minimal layout, robots: noindex
│   ├── login/            #    /login
│   ├── register/         #    /register
│   └── reset-password/   #    /reset-password
│
├── admin/                # ⚙️ NOT a route group — /admin prefix
│   ├── layout.tsx        #    AdminShell + role check
│   ├── page.tsx          #    Dashboard (/admin)
│   ├── products/         #    /admin/products
│   ├── orders/           #    /admin/orders
│   ├── users/            #    /admin/users
│   ├── brands/           #    /admin/brands
│   └── ...               #    14+ admin sections
│
└── api/                  # 🔌 API route handlers
    ├── checkout/         #    POST /api/checkout
    ├── webhook/          #    POST /api/webhook (Stripe)
    ├── orders/           #    CRUD /api/orders
    └── ...
```
- ئایا route groups بە لۆجیکی جیاکراونەتەوە؟ `(store)` بۆ public, `(auth)` بۆ auth
- ئایا admin routes لە route group نین (بۆ `/admin` URL prefix)؟
- ئایا هەر route group layout ـی خۆی هەیە؟
- ئایا `loading.tsx` و `error.tsx` بۆ route groups هەن؟

##### A2. Layout Nesting Pattern
```tsx
// ✅ Root Layout — app/layout.tsx
// سەرەوەی هەموو شت — HTML, lang, dir, fonts, global styles
export default function RootLayout({ children }) {
  return (
    <html lang="ckb" dir="rtl">
      <body>
        <LocaleProvider>
          {children}
        </LocaleProvider>
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}

// ✅ Store Layout — app/(store)/layout.tsx
// Server Component — fetches profile, passes to PreferencesProvider
export default async function StoreLayout({ children }) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  let profile = null;
  if (user) {
    const { data } = await supabase.from('profiles').select('*').eq('id', user.id).single();
    profile = data;
  }
  
  return (
    <PreferencesProvider initialProfile={profile}>
      <Navbar />
      <main id="main-content">{children}</main>
      <Footer />
    </PreferencesProvider>
  );
}

// ✅ Admin Layout — app/admin/layout.tsx
// Server Component — double auth check
export default async function AdminLayout({ children }) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) redirect('/login');
  
  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from('profiles').select('*').eq('id', user.id).single();
  if (profile?.role !== 'admin') redirect('/');
  
  return <AdminShell>{children}</AdminShell>;
}
```
- ئایا root layout minimal ـە (HTML + global providers)؟
- ئایا store layout server-side profile fetch دەکات؟
- ئایا admin layout double auth check دەکات (user exists + role === admin)؟
- ئایا layouts shared logical providers حاوی دەبن (locale, preferences)?

##### A3. File Convention Completeness
| File | Purpose | Root | (store) | (auth) | admin |
|------|---------|------|---------|--------|-------|
| `layout.tsx` | Shared UI wrapper | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| `page.tsx` | Route content | — | ✅ | — | ✅ |
| `loading.tsx` | Suspense fallback | — | ✅ | — | ✅ |
| `error.tsx` | Error boundary | ✅ | — | — | ✅ |
| `not-found.tsx` | 404 handler | ✅ | — | — | — |

- ئایا `loading.tsx` بۆ هەر route segment ـی data-heavy هەیە؟
- ئایا `error.tsx` لە root و admin هەیە؟
- ئایا `not-found.tsx` customize کراوە؟

#### B. State Management — بەڕێوەبردنی ئاستەیت

##### B1. State Categories
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                 State Management                 │
├──────────────┬──────────────┬───────────────────┤
│  Server State │ Client State │   URL State       │
│  (Supabase)  │  (Zustand)   │  (searchParams)   │
├──────────────┼──────────────┼───────────────────┤
│ products     │ cart items   │ search query      │
│ orders       │ theme        │ filter/sort       │
│ profiles     │ locale       │ pagination        │
│ wishlist     │ currency     │ modal open/close  │
│ categories   │ compare list │                   │
│ brands       │ recently     │                   │
│              │   viewed     │                   │
└──────────────┴──────────────┴───────────────────┘
```

##### B2. Zustand Store Pattern — لە NexPOS
```typescript
// ✅ store/cart.ts — Zustand بە persist middleware
import { create } from 'zustand';
import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';

interface CartStore {
  items: CartItem[];
  addItem: (product: Product, qty: number) => void;
  removeItem: (productId: string) => void;
  updateQuantity: (productId: string, qty: number) => void;
  clearCart: () => void;
  totalItems: () => number;
  totalPrice: () => number;
}

export const useCartStore = create<CartStore>()(
  persist(
    (set, get) => ({
      items: [],
      
      addItem: (product, qty) => set((state) => {
        const existing = state.items.find(i => i.id === product.id);
        if (existing) {
          return {
            items: state.items.map(i =>
              i.id === product.id
                ? { ...i, quantity: Math.min(i.quantity + qty, 99) }
                : i
            ),
          };
        }
        return { items: [...state.items, { ...product, quantity: qty }] };
      }),
      
      removeItem: (productId) => set((state) => ({
        items: state.items.filter(i => i.id !== productId),
      })),
      
      updateQuantity: (productId, qty) => set((state) => ({
        items: qty <= 0
          ? state.items.filter(i => i.id !== productId)  // ✅ qty=0 → سڕینەوە
          : state.items.map(i => i.id === productId ? { ...i, quantity: qty } : i),
      })),
      
      clearCart: () => set({ items: [] }),
      totalItems: () => get().items.reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.quantity, 0),
      totalPrice: () => get().items.reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.price * i.quantity, 0),
    }),
    { name: 'vertex-cart' }  // localStorage key
  )
);
```
- ئایا Zustand stores typed ـن بە generic `create<Store>()`؟
- ئایا `persist` middleware بەکارهاتووە بۆ localStorage persistence؟
- ئایا `get()` بۆ computed values بەکارهاتووە (نەک derived state لە set)؟
- ئایا quantity bounds (0-99) enforce کراوە؟
- ⚠️ ئایا Zustand stores **بە ئەستەم** بەکارنەهاتووە لە Server Components؟

##### B3. React Context Pattern — لە NexPOS
```typescript
// ✅ contexts/locale.tsx — Locale Context
'use client';

const LocaleContext = createContext<LocaleContextType | null>(null);

export function LocaleProvider({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [locale, setLocale] = useState<Locale>('ckb');
  
  // لە cookie + localStorage بخوێنەوە
  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = getCookie('nexpos-locale') ?? localStorage.getItem('nexpos-locale');
    if (saved && isValidLocale(saved)) setLocale(saved as Locale);
  }, []);
  
  // dir attribute بگۆڕە
  useEffect(() => {
    const isRTL = locale === 'ckb' || locale === 'ar';
    document.documentElement.dir = isRTL ? 'rtl' : 'ltr';
    document.documentElement.lang = locale;
  }, [locale]);
  
  const t = messages[locale]; // translations
  
  return (
    <LocaleContext.Provider value={{ locale, setLocale, t, dir: isRTL ? 'rtl' : 'ltr' }}>
      {children}
    </LocaleContext.Provider>
  );
}

export const useLocale = () => useContext(LocaleContext);
export const useT = () => useLocale()!.t;  // shorthand
```
- ئایا Context providers بە دروستی scope کراون؟ (نەک هەموو شت لە root)
- ئایا `useContext` hook ـەکان convenience wrapper یان هەیە؟
- ئایا locale change dir, lang, cookie, localStorage هەمووی sync دەکات؟

#### C. API & Backend Architecture — ساختاری API

##### C1. API Route Pattern
```typescript
// ✅ Consistent API route pattern — app/api/checkout/route.ts
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  // 1️⃣ Rate Limiting
  const ip = getClientIP(request);
  const { success } = checkoutLimiter.check(ip);
  if (!success) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Too many requests' }, { status: 429 });
  }
  
  // 2️⃣ Authentication
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });
  }
  
  // 3️⃣ Input Validation
  const body = await request.json();
  const parsed = CheckoutSchema.safeParse(body);
  if (!parsed.success) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Validation failed', details: parsed.error.flatten() },
      { status: 400 }
    );
  }
  
  // 4️⃣ Server-side Price Validation (never trust client)
  const { data: products } = await supabase
    .from('products')
    .select('id, price, in_stock')
    .in('id', parsed.data.items.map(i => i.id));
  
  // 5️⃣ Business Logic
  const total = calculateTotal(products, parsed.data);
  
  // 6️⃣ External API (Stripe)
  const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
    line_items: [...],
    mode: 'payment',
    success_url: `${SITE_URL}/orders?success=true`,
    cancel_url: `${SITE_URL}/cart`,
  });
  
  // 7️⃣ Database Write
  await supabase.from('orders').insert({
    user_id: user.id,
    total,
    stripe_session_id: session.id,
    status: 'pending',
  });
  
  // 8️⃣ Response
  return NextResponse.json({ url: session.url });
}
```
- ئایا API routes consistent pattern ـیان هەیە؟
  1. Rate limiting ✅
  2. Authentication ✅
  3. Input validation ✅
  4. Business logic ✅
  5. Response ✅
- ئایا هیچ API route authentication skip نەکردووە؟
- ئایا input validation (Zod) لە هەموو POST/PUT/DELETE routes هەیە؟
- ئایا **نرخ لە سێرڤەر** validate دەکرێت (نەک client trust)؟

##### C2. Webhook Pattern
```typescript
// ✅ Stripe webhook — app/api/webhook/route.ts
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const body = await request.text();
  const signature = request.headers.get('stripe-signature')!;
  
  // 1️⃣ Signature verification
  let event: Stripe.Event;
  try {
    event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, signature, WEBHOOK_SECRET);
  } catch {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid signature' }, { status: 400 });
  }
  
  // 2️⃣ Idempotency — prevent double processing
  if (event.type === 'checkout.session.completed') {
    const session = event.data.object;
    
    // ✅ تەنها pending orders update بکە (idempotent)
    const { data: order } = await supabase
      .from('orders')
      .update({ status: 'processing', paid_at: new Date().toISOString() })
      .eq('stripe_session_id', session.id)
      .eq('status', 'pending')     // ⚠️ ئەگەر processing بوو → skip (idempotent)
      .select()
      .single();
    
    if (order) {
      // 3️⃣ Multi-channel notification
      await Promise.allSettled([
        sendOrderConfirmation(order),           // Email
        supabase.from('notifications').insert({ // In-app
          user_id: order.user_id,
          title: 'داواکاریەکەت وەرگیرا',
          type: 'order_confirmed',
        }),
      ]);
    }
  }
  
  return NextResponse.json({ received: true });
}
```
- ئایا webhook signature verification هەیە؟
- ئایا idempotency handle کراوە (double delivery protection)؟
- ئایا raw body بەکارهاتووە (نەک `request.json()`) بۆ signature check؟

#### D. Database Architecture — بنچینەی داتا

##### D1. Schema Design Patterns
```sql
-- ✅ NexPOS Database Schema Patterns

-- 1. UUID Primary Keys (نەک sequential integers)
CREATE TABLE products (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug TEXT UNIQUE,
  price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL CHECK (price >= 0),
  in_stock BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  is_hidden BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  images TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  specs JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- 2. Enum-like CHECK constraints
CREATE TABLE orders (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
    CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled')),
  -- ...
);

-- 3. User-scoped uniqueness
CREATE TABLE reviews (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_id UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  rating INT CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5),
  UNIQUE(user_id, product_id)  -- یەک هەڵسەنگاندن بۆ هەر بەکارهێنەرێک
);

-- 4. Soft Delete via Trash table
CREATE TABLE trash (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  table_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  record_id UUID NOT NULL,
  record_data JSONB NOT NULL,
  deleted_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT (now() + interval '30 days')
);
```

##### D2. RLS (Row Level Security) Patterns
```sql
-- ✅ RLS Policies — NexPOS Pattern

-- بۆ ڕێگری لە RLS recursion:
CREATE FUNCTION is_admin() RETURNS BOOLEAN AS $$
  SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM profiles WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'admin'
  );
$$ LANGUAGE sql SECURITY DEFINER;

-- Products: هەموو دەتوانن بخوێننەوە، تەنها admin write
ALTER TABLE products ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "Public read" ON products FOR SELECT USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Admin insert" ON products FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (is_admin());
CREATE POLICY "Admin update" ON products FOR UPDATE USING (is_admin());
CREATE POLICY "Admin delete" ON products FOR DELETE USING (is_admin());

-- Orders: بەکارهێنەر تەنها داواکاریەکانی خۆی، admin هەمووی
CREATE POLICY "User read own" ON orders FOR SELECT 
  USING (auth.uid() = user_id OR is_admin());
CREATE POLICY "User insert own" ON orders FOR INSERT 
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);
CREATE POLICY "Admin update" ON orders FOR UPDATE 
  USING (is_admin());

-- Profiles: auto-create via trigger
CREATE FUNCTION handle_new_user() RETURNS trigger AS $$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO profiles (id, email, full_name)
  VALUES (NEW.id, NEW.email, NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name');
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

CREATE TRIGGER on_auth_user_created
  AFTER INSERT ON auth.users
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION handle_new_user();
```
- ئایا RLS enabled ـە لەسەر **هەموو** tables؟
- ئایا `is_admin()` function بە `SECURITY DEFINER` ـە (بۆ ڕێگری لە recursion)؟
- ئایا public tables (products, brands, categories) `SELECT USING (true)` یان هەیە؟
- ئایا user-scoped tables (orders, wishlist) `auth.uid() = user_id` check ـیان هەیە؟
- ئایا write policies بۆ admin ـەکان `WITH CHECK (is_admin())` یان هەیە؟
- ئایا auto-create trigger بۆ profiles هەیە؟

##### D3. Database Indexes
```sql
-- ✅ Critical indexes
CREATE INDEX idx_products_slug ON products(slug);               -- product lookup by slug
CREATE INDEX idx_products_category ON products(category_id);     -- filter by category
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user ON orders(user_id);                 -- user's orders
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status ON orders(status);                -- admin filter
CREATE INDEX idx_wishlist_user ON wishlist(user_id);             -- user's wishlist
CREATE INDEX idx_reviews_product ON reviews(product_id);         -- product reviews
CREATE INDEX idx_notifications_user ON notifications(user_id, is_read); -- unread count

-- ✅ Full-text search index
CREATE INDEX idx_products_search ON products USING gin(
  to_tsvector('simple', name || ' ' || COALESCE(description, ''))
);
```
- ئایا indexes بۆ common query patterns هەن؟
- ئایا compound indexes بۆ multi-column queries هەن؟
- ئایا full-text search index بۆ product search هەیە؟
- ⚠️ ئایا unnecessary indexes نییە (write performance impact)؟

#### E. Middleware Architecture — proxy.ts

##### E1. Middleware Flow
```typescript
// ✅ middleware.ts → src/proxy.ts
// Next.js middleware ئەم ڕێگایە دەگرێت:

// 1. Cookie bridge — Supabase session refresh
const supabase = createServerClient(URL, ANON_KEY, {
  cookies: {
    getAll: () => request.cookies.getAll(),
    setAll: (cookies) => {
      cookies.forEach(({ name, value, options }) => {
        request.cookies.set(name, value);
        response.cookies.set(name, value, options);
      });
    },
  },
});

// 2. Session refresh — هەموو request ـێکدا
await supabase.auth.getUser();

// 3. Route protection
const protectedRoutes = ['/admin', '/checkout', '/orders', '/wishlist', '/settings'];
const isProtected = protectedRoutes.some(r => pathname.startsWith(r));

if (isProtected && !user) {
  return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/login', request.url));
}

// 4. Auth redirect — logged-in users
if ((pathname === '/login' || pathname === '/register') && user) {
  return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/', request.url));
}

// 5. Admin guard
if (pathname.startsWith('/admin') && user) {
  // Admin layout does second check with profile.role
}
```
- ئایا middleware session refresh دەکات لە هەموو request ـدا؟
- ئایا protected routes redirect دەکات بۆ login؟
- ئایا auth pages redirect دەکات بۆ homepage بۆ logged-in users؟
- ⚠️ ئایا middleware سبوکە؟ (Edge runtime — 25ms timeout لە Vercel)

#### F. Data Flow Architecture — هەردووانەی داتا

##### F1. Server → Client Data Flow
```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│         Server Components (RSC)          │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────┐     │
│  │ await supabase.from('products') │     │
│  │ .select('*, brands(*)')         │     │
│  │ .eq('is_hidden', false)         │     │
│  └──────────┬──────────────────────┘     │
│             │ props                       │
│  ┌──────────▼──────────────────────┐     │
│  │    Client Components             │     │
│  │  - AddToCartButton (Zustand)     │     │
│  │  - WishlistButton (Supabase)     │     │
│  │  - ProductGallery (local state)  │     │
│  └──────────────────────────────────┘     │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```
- ئایا data fetching لە Server Components ـدایە (نەک Client)؟
- ئایا Client Components تەنها بۆ interactivity بەکارهاتوون؟
- ئایا `'use client'` boundary بە minimum دانراوە؟

#### G. Error Architecture — سیستەمی هەڵەکان

##### G1. Error Hierarchy
```
app/
├── error.tsx              # 🔴 Root error boundary — catch-all
├── not-found.tsx          # 404 — global
├── (store)/
│   ├── error.tsx          # Store-specific errors (optional)
│   ├── products/
│   │   └── [slug]/
│   │       └── not-found.tsx  # Product not found
│   └── checkout/
│       └── error.tsx      # Checkout errors (payment failures)
├── admin/
│   ├── error.tsx          # Admin error boundary
│   └── loading.tsx        # Admin loading
```
- ئایا error boundaries هەن لە:
  - Root (catch-all)
  - Admin (admin-specific)
  - Checkout (payment-specific)
- ئایا `not-found.tsx` user-friendly ـە بە helpful links؟
- ئایا error logging بۆ external service (Sentry) هەیە؟

#### B. Service Worker — Caching Strategies
```javascript
// ✅ Workbox caching strategies بۆ Next.js
// next.config.ts — بەکارهێنانی next-pwa یان serwist

// Strategy 1: Cache First — بۆ static assets
// فایلە ستاتیکەکان (JS, CSS, images) لە cache وەربگرە، ئەگەر نەبوو لە network
registerRoute(
  /\.(?:js|css|woff2?|png|jpg|svg)$/,
  new CacheFirst({
    cacheName: 'static-assets',
    plugins: [
      new ExpirationPlugin({ maxEntries: 200, maxAgeSeconds: 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 }), // 30 ڕۆژ
    ],
  })
);

// Strategy 2: Stale While Revalidate — بۆ API responses
// فەورەن لە cache نیشان بدە، پاشان لە background نوێی بکەرەوە
registerRoute(
  /\/api\//,
  new StaleWhileRevalidate({
    cacheName: 'api-cache',
    plugins: [
      new ExpirationPlugin({ maxEntries: 50, maxAgeSeconds: 5 * 60 }), // 5 خولەک
    ],
  })
);

// Strategy 3: Network First — بۆ HTML pages
// سەرەتا لە network بپرسە، ئەگەر offline بوو لە cache
registerRoute(
  /\/$/,
  new NetworkFirst({
    cacheName: 'pages-cache',
    networkTimeoutSeconds: 3,
    plugins: [
      new ExpirationPlugin({ maxEntries: 30, maxAgeSeconds: 24 * 60 * 60 }), // 1 ڕۆژ
    ],
  })
);

// Strategy 4: Network Only — بۆ sensitive routes
// هەرگیز cache مەکە — بۆ checkout, auth, admin
registerRoute(
  /\/(checkout|auth|admin)/,
  new NetworkOnly()
);
```
- ئایا Service Worker بەکارهاتووە؟ (next-pwa, serwist, @serwist/next)
- ئایا caching strategy مناسبە بۆ هەر جۆرە resource ـێک؟
- ئایا sensitive routes (checkout, auth) cache ناکرێن؟
- ئایا cache versioning / cache busting هەیە؟
- ئایا `skipWaiting` و `clientsClaim` handle کراوە بۆ updates؟

#### C. Offline Support
```javascript
// ✅ Offline detection و UI feedback
function useOnlineStatus() {
  const [isOnline, setIsOnline] = useState(navigator.onLine);
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleOnline = () => setIsOnline(true);
    const handleOffline = () => setIsOnline(false);
    window.addEventListener('online', handleOnline);
    window.addEventListener('offline', handleOffline);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('online', handleOnline);
      window.removeEventListener('offline', handleOffline);
    };
  }, []);
  
  return isOnline;
}

// ✅ Offline banner component
function OfflineBanner() {
  const isOnline = useOnlineStatus();
  if (isOnline) return null;
  return (
    <div className="fixed top-0 inset-x-0 bg-yellow-500 text-black text-center py-2 z-50">
      ⚠️ ئینتەرنێت نییە — ڕێگەی offline ـدا کار دەکەیت
    </div>
  );
}
```
- ئایا offline page/fallback هەیە؟
- ئایا offline indicator بۆ بەکارهێنەر نیشان دادرێت؟
- ئایا offline queue هەیە بۆ actions (add to cart, form submit)؟
- ئایا cached data بۆ product listings هەیە بۆ offline browsing؟
- ئایا background sync بۆ queued actions هەیە کاتێک online دەبێتەوە؟

#### D. Push Notifications
```javascript
// ✅ Push notification registration
async function subscribeToPush() {
  const registration = await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;
  
  // Check permission
  const permission = await Notification.requestPermission();
  if (permission !== 'granted') return;
  
  // Subscribe
  const subscription = await registration.pushManager.subscribe({
    userVisibleOnly: true,
    applicationServerKey: urlBase64ToUint8Array(VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY),
  });
  
  // Send subscription to server
  await fetch('/api/notify/subscribe', {
    method: 'POST',
    body: JSON.stringify(subscription),
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  });
}

// ✅ Service Worker — push event handler
self.addEventListener('push', (event) => {
  const data = event.data?.json() ?? {};
  event.waitUntil(
    self.registration.showNotification(data.title ?? 'NexPOS', {
      body: data.body,
      icon: '/icons/icon-192x192.png',
      badge: '/icons/badge-72x72.png',
      dir: 'rtl',
      lang: 'ckb',
      tag: data.tag, // prevent duplicate notifications
      data: { url: data.url ?? '/' },
      actions: data.actions ?? [],
    })
  );
});

// ✅ Notification click handler
self.addEventListener('notificationclick', (event) => {
  event.notification.close();
  const url = event.notification.data?.url ?? '/';
  event.waitUntil(clients.openWindow(url));
});
```
- ئایا VAPID keys generated و stored ـن؟
- ئایا permission بە ڕوونی و لە کاتی مناسب داوا دەکرێت (نەک فەورەن لە load)؟
- ئایا notification payload بچووک و ئەمنە؟
- ئایا `dir: 'rtl'` لە notification options دایە؟
- ئایا notification click handler بۆ deep linking هەیە؟
- ئایا notification tag بۆ deduplication بەکارهاتووە؟

#### E. App Install Prompt
```javascript
// ✅ Custom Install Prompt — PWA Install Button
function useInstallPrompt() {
  const [deferredPrompt, setDeferredPrompt] = useState(null);
  const [isInstallable, setIsInstallable] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e) => {
      e.preventDefault(); // Prevent auto-show
      setDeferredPrompt(e);
      setIsInstallable(true);
    };
    window.addEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handler);
    
    // Check if already installed
    window.addEventListener('appinstalled', () => setIsInstallable(false));
    
    return () => window.removeEventListener('beforeinstallprompt', handler);
  }, []);

  const install = async () => {
    if (!deferredPrompt) return;
    deferredPrompt.prompt();
    const { outcome } = await deferredPrompt.userChoice;
    setDeferredPrompt(null);
    setIsInstallable(false);
    // Track install analytics
    trackEvent('pwa_install', { outcome });
  };

  return { isInstallable, install };
}
```
- ئایا custom install prompt هەیە (بەجیاتی browser default)؟
- ئایا install prompt لە کاتی مناسب نیشان دادرێت (پاش engagement)؟
- ئایا install analytics tracked ـە؟

### 🔐 ٩. پشکنینی پاراستنی داتا و تایبەتمەندی (Data Privacy & Compliance)

#### A. GDPR / Privacy — ئاستی تەواو

- ئایا data retention policy هەیە؟
- ئایا داتای minimum ی پێویست کۆ دەکرێتەوە؟ (Data Minimization)
- ئایا third-party tracking بەبێ ڕەزامەندی بەکاردەهێنرێت؟

#### B. Data Handling — ئاستی ئەمنیەت
- ئایا PII encrypted ـە لە database دا؟

- ئایا audit logs بۆ sensitive operations هەیە؟

#### C. Cookie Consent Flow — Implementation
```typescript
// ✅ Cookie Consent — Supabase + Next.js
// 1. Cookie categories
type CookieConsent = {
  essential: true;       // هەمیشە — نابێت disable بکرێت
  analytics: boolean;    // Google Analytics, PostHog
  marketing: boolean;    // Facebook Pixel, ads
  preferences: boolean;  // theme, language, currency
};

// 2. Consent banner component
function CookieBanner() {
  const [consent, setConsent] = useState<CookieConsent | null>(null);
  
  // بخوێنەوە لە cookie
  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = getCookie('cookie-consent');
    if (saved) setConsent(JSON.parse(saved));
  }, []);
  
  if (consent) return null; // consent already given
  
  return (
    <div className="fixed bottom-0 inset-x-0 bg-white border-t p-4 z-50 
      pb-[calc(1rem+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))]">
      <p className="text-sm mb-4">
        ئەم وێبسایتە cookies بەکاردەهێنێت بۆ باشترکردنی ئەزموونەکەت.
      </p>
      <div className="flex gap-2">
        <button onClick={() => acceptAll()} className="btn-primary">
          هەمووی قبوڵ بکە
        </button>
        <button onClick={() => acceptEssential()} className="btn-secondary">
          تەنها پێویستەکان
        </button>
        <button onClick={() => openSettings()} className="btn-ghost">
          ڕێکخستنەکان
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// 3. Conditional script loading based on consent
function AnalyticsProvider({ children }) {
  const consent = useCookieConsent();
  
  return (
    <>
      {children}
      {consent?.analytics && (
        <Script 
          src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=GA_ID"
          strategy="afterInteractive"
        />
      )}
    </>
  );
}
```
- ئایا consent flow ـی تەواو هەیە بە categories؟
- ئایا بەکارهێنەر دەتوانێت بڕیاری بگۆڕێتەوە؟
- ئایا third-party scripts تەنها پاش consent load دەکرێن؟
- ئایا consent preference لە cookie خەزن دەکرێت (نەک server)؟

#### D. Data Export & Deletion — GDPR Rights
```typescript
// ✅ Right to Portability — Data Export API
// app/api/account/export/route.ts
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });
  
  // Collect all user data
  const [profile, orders, addresses, wishlist] = await Promise.all([
    supabase.from('profiles').select('*').eq('id', user.id).single(),
    supabase.from('orders').select('*, order_items(*)').eq('user_id', user.id),
    supabase.from('addresses').select('*').eq('user_id', user.id),
    supabase.from('wishlist').select('*, products(name, price)').eq('user_id', user.id),
  ]);
  
  const exportData = {
    exported_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    user: { email: user.email, created_at: user.created_at },
    profile: profile.data,
    orders: orders.data,
    addresses: addresses.data,
    wishlist: wishlist.data,
  };
  
  return NextResponse.json(exportData, {
    headers: {
      'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="nexpos-data-${user.id}.json"`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    },
  });
}

// ✅ Right to Erasure — Account Deletion
// app/api/account/delete/route.ts
export async function DELETE(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 });
  
  // 1. Anonymize orders (keep for accounting, remove PII)
  await supabase.from('orders')
    .update({ customer_name: 'DELETED', customer_email: 'DELETED', phone: null, address: null })
    .eq('user_id', user.id);
  
  // 2. Delete personal data
  await Promise.all([
    supabase.from('addresses').delete().eq('user_id', user.id),
    supabase.from('wishlist').delete().eq('user_id', user.id),
    supabase.from('cart_items').delete().eq('user_id', user.id),
    supabase.from('profiles').delete().eq('id', user.id),
  ]);
  
  // 3. Delete auth account
  const adminClient = createAdminClient();
  await adminClient.auth.admin.deleteUser(user.id);
  
  // 4. Audit log
  await supabase.from('audit_logs').insert({
    action: 'ACCOUNT_DELETED',
    user_id: user.id,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
  });
  
  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}
```
- ئایا data export endpoint هەیە بە JSON/CSV format؟
- ئایا account deletion ـی تەواو implement کراوە؟
- ئایا orders anonymized دەکرێن (نەک deleted — بۆ accounting)؟
- ئایا audit log بۆ deletion هەیە؟
- ئایا confirmation step هەیە پێش deletion؟ (type "DELETE" to confirm)

#### E. Audit Logging — ئاستی Enterprise
```typescript
// ✅ Audit Log System
// Database table
/*
CREATE TABLE audit_logs (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  action TEXT NOT NULL,
  resource_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  resource_id TEXT,
  old_value JSONB,
  new_value JSONB,
  ip_address INET,
  user_agent TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_user ON audit_logs(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_action ON audit_logs(action);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_created ON audit_logs(created_at);
*/

// Audit log helper
async function auditLog(supabase, {
  action, resourceType, resourceId, oldValue, newValue, request
}) {
  const forwarded = request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for');
  const ip = forwarded?.split(',')[0] ?? 'unknown';
  
  await supabase.from('audit_logs').insert({
    action,
    resource_type: resourceType,
    resource_id: resourceId,
    old_value: oldValue,
    new_value: newValue,
    ip_address: ip,
    user_agent: request.headers.get('user-agent'),
  });
}

// Usage
await auditLog(supabase, {
  action: 'ORDER_STATUS_CHANGED',
  resourceType: 'order',
  resourceId: orderId,
  oldValue: { status: 'pending' },
  newValue: { status: 'shipped' },
  request,
});
```
- ئایا audit log system هەیە بۆ admin actions؟
- ئایا IP address و user agent logged ـن؟
- ئایا old/new values stored ـن بۆ changes؟
- ئایا audit logs immutable ـن (append-only, no DELETE)؟
- ئایا retention policy هەیە بۆ audit logs؟ (minimum 1 year)

### ⚙️ ١٠. پشکنینی DevOps و Infrastructure

#### A. Deployment & CI/CD — Vercel + GitHub
```yaml
# ✅ .github/workflows/ci.yml — GitHub Actions Pipeline
name: CI/CD Pipeline
on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  quality:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: 'npm'
      
      - run: npm ci
      
      # TypeScript type checking
      - name: Type Check
        run: npx tsc --noEmit
      
      # ESLint
      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint
      
      # Unit & Integration Tests
      - name: Test
        run: npm test -- --coverage
        env:
          NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}
          NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY }}
      
      # Build check
      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
      
      # Bundle size check
      - name: Bundle Analysis
        run: npx @next/bundle-analyzer

  # E2E tests only on main/PR
  e2e:
    needs: quality
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 20, cache: 'npm' }
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npx playwright install --with-deps
      - run: npx playwright test
```
- ئایا CI/CD pipeline هەیە و لە هەموو PRs دا ڕان دەکرێت؟
- ئایا type checking (`tsc --noEmit`) لە pipeline دایە؟
- ئایا linting لە pipeline دایە؟
- ئایا tests (unit + integration) لە pipeline دایە؟
- ئایا build check لە pipeline دایە؟
- ئایا E2E tests بۆ PRs ڕان دەکرێن؟
- ئایا bundle size monitoring هەیە؟

```typescript
// ✅ Health Check Endpoint
// app/api/health/route.ts
export async function GET() {
  const checks = {
    status: 'healthy',
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    version: process.env.VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA?.slice(0, 7) ?? 'dev',
    uptime: process.uptime(),
    checks: {} as Record<string, string>,
  };
  
  // Database check
  try {
    const supabase = createAdminClient();
    await supabase.from('profiles').select('count').limit(1);
    checks.checks.database = 'ok';
  } catch {
    checks.checks.database = 'error';
    checks.status = 'degraded';
  }
  
  return NextResponse.json(checks, {
    status: checks.status === 'healthy' ? 200 : 503,
  });
}
```

#### E. Rollback & Incident Response
```
📋 Incident Response Plan:

1. 🔍 DETECT — هەڵەکە بدۆزەوە
   - Vercel deployment logs
   - Sentry error alerts
   - User reports
   - Health check failures

2. 🛑 CONTAIN — ببەستەوە
   - Vercel: Instant Rollback to previous deployment
   - ئەگەر database migration بوو: revert migration
   - ئەگەر feature flag بوو: disable flag

3. 🔧 FIX — چارەسەر بکە
   - Hotfix branch: fix/incident-YYYY-MM-DD
   - تێست لە staging پێشتر
   - Deploy بە confidence

4. 📝 POST-MORTEM — فێربوون
   - چی ڕوویدا؟
   - بۆچی ڕوویدا؟
   - چۆن ڕێگری لێبگرین بۆ داهاتوو؟
```
- ئایا rollback strategy هەیە و تێست کراوە؟

- ئایا incident response plan documented ـە؟

### 🌐 ١١. پشکنینی Cross-Browser & Compatibility

#### A. Browser Support Matrix
| Browser | Version | Priority | Status |
|---------|---------|----------|--------|
| Chrome (Desktop) | Last 2 | 🔴 Critical | □ تێست کرا |
| Chrome (Android) | Last 2 | 🔴 Critical | □ تێست کرا |
| Safari (iOS) | Last 2 | 🔴 Critical | □ تێست کرا |
| Safari (macOS) | Last 2 | 🟡 High | □ تێست کرا |
| Firefox | Last 2 | 🟡 High | □ تێست کرا |
| Edge | Last 2 | 🟡 High | □ تێست کرا |
| Samsung Internet | Last 2 | 🟢 Medium | □ تێست کرا |
| Opera | Last 2 | 🟢 Medium | □ تێست کرا |
| UC Browser | Latest | ℹ️ Nice-to-have | □ تێست کرا |

#### B. CSS Compatibility — Known Issues
```css
/* ❌ Safari gap in flexbox — iOS 14.x */
.flex-container { gap: 16px; }
/* ✅ Fallback */
.flex-container > * + * { margin-inline-start: 16px; }

/* ❌ Safari 100vh includes address bar */
.full-height { height: 100vh; }
/* ✅ Modern fix */
.full-height { height: 100dvh; } /* Dynamic viewport height */
/* ✅ Fallback for older browsers */
@supports not (height: 100dvh) {
  .full-height { height: -webkit-fill-available; }
}

/* ❌ iOS input zoom — inputs < 16px get zoomed */
input { font-size: 14px; } /* 🐛 iOS zooms! */
/* ✅ Fix */
input { font-size: max(16px, 1rem); }

/* ❌ Safari backdrop-filter needs prefix */
.blur { backdrop-filter: blur(8px); }
/* ✅ With prefix */
.blur { -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); }

/* ❌ Firefox scrollbar styling */
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; } /* Chrome/Safari only */
/* ✅ Firefox compatible */
* { scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: #888 transparent; }

/* ❌ Safari position: sticky in overflow container */
/* Safari doesn't support sticky in overflow:auto parent */
/* ✅ Restructure DOM: move sticky element outside overflow container */

/* ❌ Safari date input */
input[type="date"] {} /* Safari shows different UI */
/* ✅ Custom date picker component (react-day-picker, etc.) */

/* ❌ iOS PWA status bar overlap */
/* ✅ Use safe area insets */
padding-top: env(safe-area-inset-top);
```
- ئایا `100vh` بەکارهاتووە؟ → بیگۆڕە بۆ `100dvh`
- ئایا inputs font-size < 16px ـن؟ → iOS zoom bug
- ئایا backdrop-filter بەبێ `-webkit-` prefix بەکارهاتووە؟
- ئایا scrollbar styling cross-browser ـە؟
- ئایا date inputs بە custom component handle دەکرێن؟

#### C. JavaScript API Compatibility
```javascript
// ✅ Feature detection pattern
if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
  // Modern: use IntersectionObserver
} else {
  // Fallback: scroll event listener
}

// ✅ APIs بە browser support ـی جیاواز:
// ResizeObserver — ✅ All modern browsers
// IntersectionObserver — ✅ All modern browsers  
// MutationObserver — ✅ All modern browsers
// AbortController — ✅ All modern browsers
// structuredClone — ⚠️ Not in Safari < 15.4
// Array.at() — ⚠️ Not in Safari < 15.4
// Object.hasOwn() — ⚠️ Not in Safari < 15.4
// crypto.randomUUID() — ⚠️ Not in Safari < 15.4 (HTTPS only)
// navigator.clipboard — ⚠️ Requires HTTPS + user gesture
// View Transitions API — ❌ Chrome only (as of 2024)
// Container Queries — ✅ All modern browsers (2023+)
// :has() selector — ✅ All modern browsers (2023+)
// CSS Nesting — ✅ All modern browsers (2023+)
// Popover API — ⚠️ Not in Firefox < 125
```
- ئایا feature detection بەکارهاتووە بەجیاتی browser detection؟
- ئایا `browserslist` لە `package.json` configure کراوە؟
- ئایا polyfills تەنها بۆ features ـی needed load دەکرێن؟

### 📊 ١٢. پشکنینی Analytics و Business Intelligence

#### A. Analytics Setup — Privacy-First
```typescript
// ✅ Google Analytics 4 — لەگەڵ cookie consent
// components/Analytics.tsx
'use client';
import Script from 'next/script';
import { useCookieConsent } from '@/hooks/useCookieConsent';

export function Analytics() {
  const consent = useCookieConsent();
  
  if (!consent?.analytics) return null;
  
  return (
    <>
      <Script
        src={`https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=${GA_ID}`}
        strategy="afterInteractive"
      />
      <Script id="ga-config" strategy="afterInteractive">
        {`
          window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
          function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
          gtag('js', new Date());
          gtag('config', '${GA_ID}', {
            anonymize_ip: true,
            cookie_flags: 'SameSite=Lax;Secure',
          });
        `}
      </Script>
    </>
  );
}

// ✅ Alternative: Plausible (privacy-friendly, no cookies)
// components/PlausibleAnalytics.tsx
export function PlausibleAnalytics() {
  return (
    <Script
      defer
      data-domain="nexpos.app"
      src="https://plausible.io/js/script.js"
      strategy="afterInteractive"
    />
  );
}
```
- ئایا analytics tool بەکارهاتووە؟
- ئایا `anonymize_ip: true` دانراوە؟
- ئایا analytics تەنها پاش cookie consent load دەکرێت؟
- ئایا privacy-friendly alternative (Plausible/Umami) بیرکراوەتەوە؟

#### B. Event Tracking — E-Commerce Events
```typescript
// ✅ E-Commerce event tracking system
const analytics = {
  // Product Events
  viewProduct(product) {
    gtag('event', 'view_item', {
      currency: 'IQD',
      value: product.price,
      items: [{ item_id: product.id, item_name: product.name, price: product.price }],
    });
  },
  
  // Cart Events
  addToCart(product, quantity) {
    gtag('event', 'add_to_cart', {
      currency: 'IQD',
      value: product.price * quantity,
      items: [{ item_id: product.id, item_name: product.name, quantity, price: product.price }],
    });
  },
  
  removeFromCart(product) {
    gtag('event', 'remove_from_cart', {
      items: [{ item_id: product.id, item_name: product.name }],
    });
  },
  
  // Checkout Events
  beginCheckout(cart) {
    gtag('event', 'begin_checkout', {
      currency: 'IQD',
      value: cart.total,
      items: cart.items.map(i => ({ item_id: i.id, item_name: i.name, quantity: i.qty, price: i.price })),
    });
  },
  
  purchase(order) {
    gtag('event', 'purchase', {
      transaction_id: order.id,
      currency: 'IQD',
      value: order.total,
      shipping: order.shipping,
      tax: order.tax,
      items: order.items.map(i => ({ item_id: i.id, item_name: i.name, quantity: i.qty, price: i.price })),
    });
  },
  
  // Search Events
  search(term, resultsCount) {
    gtag('event', 'search', { search_term: term, results_count: resultsCount });
  },
  
  // Custom Events
  signUp(method) { gtag('event', 'sign_up', { method }); },
  login(method) { gtag('event', 'login', { method }); },
  share(contentType, itemId) { gtag('event', 'share', { content_type: contentType, item_id: itemId }); },
};
```
- ئایا GA4 Enhanced E-Commerce events tracked ـن؟
  - `view_item` — بینینی بەرهەم
  - `add_to_cart` — زیادکردن بۆ سەبەتە
  - `remove_from_cart` — سڕینەوە لە سەبەتە
  - `begin_checkout` — دەستپێکردنی checkout
  - `purchase` — کڕین
  - `search` — گەڕان
  - `sign_up` / `login` — تۆمارکردن / چوونەژوورەوە
- ئایا currency بۆ IQD دانراوە؟
- ئایا events بە consistent naming convention ـن؟

#### C. Conversion Funnel Tracking
```
📊 E-Commerce Funnel:
  
  Visit Homepage ────────────> 100%
       │
  View Product ──────────────>  40%
       │
  Add to Cart ───────────────>  15%
       │
  Begin Checkout ────────────>   8%
       │
  Purchase ──────────────────>   3%

📊 Key Metrics to Track:
  - Conversion Rate: Purchase / Visit
  - Cart Abandonment Rate: (Begin Checkout - Purchase) / Begin Checkout
  - Average Order Value (AOV)
  - Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)  
  - Return Rate
  - Time to Purchase
  - Pages per Session
  - Bounce Rate per Page
```
- ئایا conversion funnel defined و tracked ـە؟
- ئایا cart abandonment tracked ـە؟
- ئایا key business metrics calculated ـن؟
- ئایا custom dashboards هەن بۆ business insights؟

```typescript
    non_interaction: true,
```

### 🧠 ١٣. پشکنینی ئەدڤانسی React و Next.js — ئاستی پسپۆڕ

#### A. Server Components vs Client Components (قوول)

##### A1. Component Boundary Strategy
```tsx
// ✅ Server Component — default (zero JS shipped)
// app/(store)/products/[slug]/page.tsx
export default async function ProductPage({ params }: { params: { slug: string } }) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: product } = await supabase
    .from('products')
    .select('*, brands(name), reviews(rating, comment, profiles(full_name))')
    .eq('slug', params.slug)
    .single();
  
  if (!product) notFound();
  
  return (
    <article>
      {/* ✅ Server-rendered — SEO indexable */}
      <h1>{product.name}</h1>
      <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{formatPrice(product.price)}</p>
      
      {/* ✅ Client Island — minimum JS boundary */}
      <ProductGallery images={product.images} />
      <AddToCartButton product={product} />
      <WishlistButton productId={product.id} />
    </article>
  );
}

// ❌ هەڵە — هەموو page بکە بە client component
'use client';  // 🔴 لە page.tsx — هەموو data fetching client-side!
export default function ProductPage() {
  const [product, setProduct] = useState(null);
  useEffect(() => { /* fetch */ }, []);  // 🔴 SEO blind, double render
}
```
- ئایا `"use client"` تەنها لە شوێنی پێویستدا بەکارهاتووە؟
  - **یاسای زێڕین**: هەموو شتێک Server Component بە default
  - ئایا data fetching لە Server Components دایە (نەک Client Components بە useEffect)؟
  - ئایا sensitive logic (database, API keys) لە Server Components دایە؟
- **Serialization Boundary**: ئایا props ـی non-serializable (functions, classes) لە Server بۆ Client نەنێردراوە؟
- **Component Islands**: ئایا interactive parts بە بچوکترین client component wrap کراون؟

##### A2. Decision Tree
```
ئایا component ـەکە:
├── onClick, onChange, onSubmit هەیە؟ → 'use client'
├── useState, useEffect, useRef هەیە؟ → 'use client' 
├── Zustand store بەکاردەهێنێت؟ → 'use client'
├── Browser API (window, document)؟ → 'use client'
├── data fetch لە database دەکات؟ → Server Component ✅
├── static UI ـە (layout, card)؟ → Server Component ✅
└── env variables / secrets لایە؟ → Server Component ✅ (هەرگیز client!)
```

#### B. Server Actions (Next.js 14+)

##### B1. Secure Server Action
```typescript
// ✅ app/actions/order.ts — server action بە auth + validation
'use server';

import { z } from 'zod';
import { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase-server';
import { revalidatePath } from 'next/cache';

const UpdateOrderSchema = z.object({
  orderId: z.string().uuid(),
  status: z.enum(['processing', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled']),
});

export async function updateOrderStatus(formData: FormData) {
  // 1️⃣ Auth check — ALWAYS!
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) throw new Error('Unauthorized');
  
  // 2️⃣ Role check
  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from('profiles').select('role').eq('id', user.id).single();
  if (profile?.role !== 'admin') throw new Error('Forbidden');
  
  // 3️⃣ Input validation
  const parsed = UpdateOrderSchema.safeParse({
    orderId: formData.get('orderId'),
    status: formData.get('status'),
  });
  if (!parsed.success) throw new Error('Invalid input');
  
  // 4️⃣ Database update
  await supabase
    .from('orders')
    .update({ status: parsed.data.status })
    .eq('id', parsed.data.orderId);
  
  // 5️⃣ Cache invalidation
  revalidatePath('/admin/orders');
}
```
- ⚠️ Server Actions = exposed endpoints — هەر کەسێک دەتوانێت بانگیان بکات!
- ئایا auth check لە هەر server action دایە؟
- ئایا input validation (Zod) لە هەر server action دایە؟
- ئایا `revalidatePath` / `revalidateTag` بەکارهاتووە؟

#### C. Streaming & Suspense Patterns

##### C1. Granular Streaming
```tsx
// ✅ app/(store)/page.tsx — homepage بە streaming
export default function HomePage() {
  return (
    <main>
      {/* ✅ Hero — instant (SSR) */}
      <HeroBanner />
      
      {/* ✅ Products — stream in */}
      <Suspense fallback={<ProductGridSkeleton count={8} />}>
        <FeaturedProducts />
      </Suspense>
      
      {/* ✅ Categories — parallel stream */}
      <Suspense fallback={<CategorySkeleton />}>
        <CategoriesSection />
      </Suspense>
      
      {/* ✅ Reviews — low priority, stream last */}
      <Suspense fallback={<ReviewsSkeleton />}>
        <RecentReviews />
      </Suspense>
    </main>
  );
}

// ✅ Skeleton component — مانادار و responsive
function ProductGridSkeleton({ count }: { count: number }) {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
      {Array.from({ length: count }).map((_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="animate-pulse">
          <div className="bg-muted aspect-square rounded-lg" />
          <div className="h-4 bg-muted rounded mt-2 w-3/4" />
          <div className="h-4 bg-muted rounded mt-1 w-1/2" />
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```
- ئایا `<Suspense>` بۆ granular streaming بەکارهاتووە؟
- ئایا `loading.tsx` بۆ route-level streaming هەیە؟
- ئایا fallback components مانادارن و skeleton ـن (نەک spinner)؟
- ئایا heavy sections wrap کراون بۆ ئەوەی باقی لاپەڕەکە خێراتر نیشان بدرێت؟

##### D1. Compound Components

##### D2. Composition Pattern

```tsx
// ✅ Composition — flexible, reusable
<Card>
  <Card.Header>
    <Card.Title>Product Name</Card.Title>
  </Card.Header>
  <Card.Body>
    <Card.Image src={product.images[0]} />
    <Card.Price>{product.price}</Card.Price>
  </Card.Body>

</Card>

// ❌ Prop drilling — inflexible, hard to customize

  title="Product Name"
  image={product.images[0]}
  price={product.price}
  footer={<AddToCartButton />}
  showBorder
  variant="large"
  // ...20 more props
/>
```

#### E. React Hooks — ئەدڤانس

##### E1. Custom Hooks — NexPOS Patterns
```typescript
// ✅ useDebounce — بۆ search input
function useDebounce<T>(value: T, delay: number): T {
  const [debouncedValue, setDebouncedValue] = useState(value);
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => setDebouncedValue(value), delay);
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [value, delay]);
  
  return debouncedValue;
}

// ✅ useMediaQuery — بۆ responsive logic
function useMediaQuery(query: string): boolean {
  const [matches, setMatches] = useState(false);
  
  useEffect(() => {
    const media = window.matchMedia(query);
    setMatches(media.matches);
    const listener = (e: MediaQueryListEvent) => setMatches(e.matches);
    media.addEventListener('change', listener);
    return () => media.removeEventListener('change', listener);
  }, [query]);
  
  return matches;
}

// ✅ Usage لە component دا
function ProductSearch() {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const debouncedSearch = useDebounce(search, 300);  // ✅ 300ms debounce
  const isMobile = useMediaQuery('(max-width: 640px)');
  
  useEffect(() => {
    if (debouncedSearch) fetchProducts(debouncedSearch);
  }, [debouncedSearch]);
}
```

##### E2. React 19 Hooks
```typescript
// ✅ useTransition — non-blocking UI updates
function SearchFilter({ onFilter }: { onFilter: (query: string) => void }) {
  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();
  
  return (
    <input
      onChange={(e) => {
        startTransition(() => onFilter(e.target.value));  // ✅ non-blocking
      }}
    />
  );
}

// ✅ useOptimistic — optimistic wishlist
function WishlistButton({ productId, isWished }: Props) {
  const [optimisticWished, setOptimisticWished] = useOptimistic(isWished);
  
  async function toggleWishlist() {
    setOptimisticWished(!optimisticWished);  // ✅ instant UI
    await supabase.from('wishlist').upsert({ product_id: productId });
  }
}

// ✅ useId — SSR-safe unique IDs
function FormField({ label }: { label: string }) {
  const id = useId();  // ✅ SSR-safe (نەک Math.random!)
  return (
    <>
      <label htmlFor={id}>{label}</label>
      <input id={id} />
    </>
  );
}
```

#### F. Data Fetching Patterns

##### F1. Server Component Fetching
```typescript
// ✅ Supabase fetch لە Server Component — zero client JS
export default async function ProductsPage({
  searchParams,
}: {
  searchParams: { q?: string; category?: string; page?: string };
}) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const page = parseInt(searchParams.page || '1');
  const limit = 20;
  
  let query = supabase
    .from('products')
    .select('id, name, price, images, slug, brands(name)', { count: 'exact' })
    .eq('is_hidden', false);
  
  if (searchParams.q) {
    query = query.ilike('name', `%${searchParams.q}%`);
  }
  if (searchParams.category) {
    query = query.eq('category_id', searchParams.category);
  }
  
  const { data: products, count } = await query
    .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    .range((page - 1) * limit, page * limit - 1);
  
  return (
    <>
      <ProductGrid products={products || []} />
      <Pagination total={count || 0} page={page} limit={limit} />
    </>
  );
}
```

##### F2. Parallel Data Fetching
```typescript
// ✅ Homepage — parallel fetches
export default async function HomePage() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  
  // ✅ ئەمانە parallel ـن — Promise.all
  const [
    { data: featured },
    { data: categories },
    { data: brands },
  ] = await Promise.all([
    supabase.from('products').select('*').eq('featured', true).limit(8),
    supabase.from('categories').select('*'),
    supabase.from('brands').select('*'),
  ]);
  
  return (
    <>
      <FeaturedProducts products={featured || []} />
      <CategoryGrid categories={categories || []} />
      <BrandRow brands={brands || []} />
    </>
  );
}
```

#### G. Grep Patterns بۆ React/Next.js
```bash
# 🔍 بگەڕێ بۆ:
grep -rn "'use client'" src/ | wc -l              # ژمارەی client components
grep -rn "useEffect" src/ --include="*.tsx" | wc -l  # overuse?
grep -rn "getSession()" src/                       # دەبێت getUser() بێت
grep -rn "key={.*index\|key={i}" src/              # key={index} — هەڵە!
grep -rn "dangerouslySetInnerHTML" src/             # XSS risk
grep -rn "as any" src/                              # type escape
```

### 🔧 ١٤. پشکنینی ئەدڤانسی TypeScript — ئاستی ماستەر

#### A. NexPOS Type System — types/index.ts
```typescript
// ✅ types/index.ts — Complete type inventory

// A1. Union Types — String Literal Unions
export type Role = 'user' | 'admin';
export type OrderStatus = 'pending' | 'processing' | 'shipped' | 'delivered' | 'cancelled';
export type DiscountType = 'percent' | 'fixed';
export type NotificationType = 'info' | 'order' | 'promo' | 'system';
export type LogLevel = 'info' | 'warning' | 'error' | 'critical';
export type LogSource = 'api' | 'auth' | 'db' | 'cron' | 'manual';
export type PromotionPosition = 'hero_banner' | 'bar' | 'popup' | 'sidebar';
export type ReturnStatus = 'pending' | 'approved' | 'rejected' | 'refunded';

// A2. Core Entity Types
export interface Profile {
  id: string;
  email: string;
  full_name: string | null;
  role: Role;
  phone: string | null;
  avatar_url: string | null;
  preferred_locale: string | null;
  notify_email: boolean;
  notify_order: boolean;
  notify_promo: boolean;
  notify_wishlist: boolean;
  notify_stock: boolean;
  notify_sms: boolean;
  newsletter: boolean;
  login_alerts: boolean;
  auto_apply_coupon: boolean;
  theme: string;
  currency: string;
  compact_mode: boolean;
  created_at: string;
}

export interface Product {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  brand: string;
  model: string;
  category: string;
  price: number;
  old_price: number | null;
  description: string;
  specs: string[];
  images: string[];
  rating: number;
  review_count: number;
  in_stock: boolean;
  stock_quantity: number;
  is_new: boolean;
  is_hot: boolean;
  hidden: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  variants?: ProductVariant[];
}

export interface Order {
  id: string;
  user_id: string;
  user?: Profile;               // ✅ Optional join
  items: OrderItem[];            // ✅ Nested relation
  total: number;
  status: OrderStatus;           // ✅ String literal union
  stripe_session_id: string | null;
  shipping_address: ShippingAddress;
  shipping_method: string;
  shipping_cost: number;
  tracking_number: string | null;
  carrier: string | null;
  created_at: string;
}
```
- ئایا هەموو entities لە `types/index.ts` دیاری کراون؟
- ئایا `| null` بەکارهاتووە بۆ nullable database columns (نەک `?`)؟
- ئایا nested types بە `?` optional ـن بۆ joins؟

#### B. Advanced Type Patterns لە NexPOS
```typescript
// ✅ B1. Discriminated Unions — Order Status State
type OrderState = 
  | { status: 'pending'; canCancel: true }
  | { status: 'processing'; canCancel: true; estimatedShip: Date }
  | { status: 'shipped'; canCancel: false; trackingNumber: string }
  | { status: 'delivered'; canCancel: false; deliveredAt: Date }
  | { status: 'cancelled'; canCancel: false; cancelledAt: Date; reason: string };

// ✅ B2. Exhaustive switch
function getOrderAction(state: OrderState): string {
  switch (state.status) {
    case 'pending': return 'Cancel or wait';
    case 'processing': return `Ships by ${state.estimatedShip}`;
    case 'shipped': return `Track: ${state.trackingNumber}`;
    case 'delivered': return `Delivered at ${state.deliveredAt}`;
    case 'cancelled': return `Cancelled: ${state.reason}`;
    default: {
      const _exhaustive: never = state;  // ✅ Compile error if case missed!
      throw new Error(`Unknown status: ${_exhaustive}`);
    }
  }
}

// ✅ B3. Branded Types — Prevent ID mixups
type UserId = string & { __brand: 'UserId' };
type ProductId = string & { __brand: 'ProductId' };
type OrderId = string & { __brand: 'OrderId' };

// ❌ Without branding — silent bugs:
function getOrder(userId: string, orderId: string) { ... }
getOrder(orderId, userId);  // 🔴 Swapped args — no error!

// ✅ With branding — caught at compile time:
function getOrder(userId: UserId, orderId: OrderId) { ... }
getOrder(orderId, userId);  // 🟢 Type error!

// ✅ B4. Mapped Types — Make all fields readonly for display
type ReadonlyProduct = Readonly<Product>;
type ProductSummary = Pick<Product, 'id' | 'name' | 'price' | 'images'>;
type ProductUpdate = Partial<Omit<Product, 'id' | 'created_at'>>;

// ✅ B5. Template Literal Types — Type-safe API routes
type ApiRoute = `/api/${string}`;
type AdminRoute = `/api/admin/${string}`;
type StoreRoute = `/(store)/${string}`;

// ✅ B6. Conditional Types — Extract nullable fields
type NullableKeys<T> = {
  [K in keyof T]: null extends T[K] ? K : never
}[keyof T];

type ProductNullables = NullableKeys<Product>;
// Result: 'old_price' | 'variants' — useful for form validation!

// ✅ B7. satisfies — Type-check without widening
const ORDER_COLORS = {
  pending: 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800',
  processing: 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800',
  shipped: 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800',
  delivered: 'bg-green-100 text-green-800',
  cancelled: 'bg-red-100 text-red-800',
} satisfies Record<OrderStatus, string>;
// ✅ ORDER_COLORS.pending is string (not widened to string)
// ✅ TypeScript ensures all OrderStatus values are covered
```

#### C. Zod Schemas لە NexPOS
```typescript
// ✅ Runtime validation — API routes
import { z } from 'zod';

// C1. Checkout schema — server-side validation
const CheckoutSchema = z.object({
  items: z.array(z.object({
    productId: z.string().uuid(),
    quantity: z.number().int().min(1).max(99),
  })).min(1).max(50),
  shippingAddress: z.object({
    name: z.string().min(2).max(100),
    email: z.string().email(),
    phone: z.string().regex(/^(\+964|0)?7\d{9}$/),
    address: z.string().min(5).max(500),
    city: z.string().min(2).max(100),
    country: z.string().length(2),
    zip: z.string().max(20),
  }),
  couponCode: z.string().max(50).optional(),
  shippingMethod: z.enum(['standard', 'express', 'pickup']),
});

// ✅ Infer TypeScript type from Zod schema
type CheckoutInput = z.infer<typeof CheckoutSchema>;

// C2. Product schema — admin CRUD
const ProductSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(2).max(200),
  price: z.number().min(0).max(999999),
  old_price: z.number().nullable().optional(),
  description: z.string().max(5000),
  category: z.string().uuid(),
  brand: z.string().max(100),
  images: z.array(z.string().url()).min(1).max(10),
  in_stock: z.boolean().default(true),
  stock_quantity: z.number().int().min(0).default(0),
  specs: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
});

// C3. Environment validation — lib/env.ts
const EnvSchema = z.object({
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL: z.string().url(),
  NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: z.string().min(20),
  SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY: z.string().min(20),
  STRIPE_SECRET_KEY: z.string().startsWith('sk_'),
  STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET: z.string().startsWith('whsec_'),
  RESEND_API_KEY: z.string().startsWith('re_'),
});
```

#### D. tsconfig.json — NexPOS Configuration
```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,                           // ✅ CRITICAL — always true!
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{ "name": "next" }],
    "paths": { "@/*": ["./src/*"] }           // ✅ Clean imports
  }
}
```
| Option | NexPOS | Ideal | Impact |
|--------|--------|-------|--------|
| `strict` | ✅ `true` | `true` | Catches null/undefined bugs |
| `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` | ❌ missing | `true` | array[0] → T \| undefined |
| `exactOptionalProperties` | ❌ missing | `true` | undefined ≠ optional |
| `noImplicitReturns` | ❌ missing | `true` | All branches must return |
| `moduleResolution` | ✅ `bundler` | `bundler` | Modern resolution |
| `paths` | ✅ `@/*` | `@/*` | Clean imports |

```bash
# 🔍 TypeScript grep patterns
grep -rn "as any" src/          # ❌ Type assertion escape hatch
grep -rn "as unknown" src/      # ⚠️ Double assertion — suspicious
grep -rn "@ts-ignore" src/      # ❌ Type suppression
grep -rn "@ts-expect-error" src/ # ⚠️ Slightly better but still suspicious
grep -rn "// @ts-nocheck" src/  # ❌❌ Entire file unchecked!
grep -rn "!\.  " src/           # ⚠️ Non-null assertions
grep -rn "\.toString()" src/    # ⚠️ May throw on null
grep -rn "as string\|as number" src/ # ⚠️ Unsafe casts
```

### 💾 ١٥. پشکنینی ئەدڤانسی Database و Backend — ئاستی سیستەمی

#### A. NexPOS Schema — 15 Tables
```sql
-- ✅ Complete NexPOS Schema Audit

-- 1. profiles — extends auth.users
CREATE TABLE profiles (
  id                UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE PRIMARY KEY,
  email             TEXT NOT NULL,
  full_name         TEXT,
  role              TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user' CHECK (role IN ('user', 'admin')),
  phone             TEXT,
  avatar_url        TEXT,
  preferred_locale  TEXT DEFAULT 'en',
  -- 10+ notification/preference columns
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- ✅ Auto-create profile trigger
CREATE FUNCTION handle_new_user() RETURNS trigger
LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO profiles (id, email, full_name)
  VALUES (NEW.id, NEW.email, NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name');
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$$;
-- ⚠️ SECURITY DEFINER = runs as function owner, bypasses RLS

-- 2. products — Main catalog
CREATE TABLE products (
  id           UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  name         TEXT NOT NULL,
  brand        TEXT NOT NULL,
  model        TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  category     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scanners',
  price        NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL,
  old_price    NUMERIC(10,2),              -- nullable = sale price feature
  description  TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  specs        TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',         -- PostgreSQL array
  images       TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',         -- PostgreSQL array
  rating       NUMERIC(3,1) DEFAULT 4.5,
  review_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  in_stock     BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  is_new       BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  is_hot       BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  hidden       BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- 5. orders — with status constraint
CREATE TABLE orders (
  id                UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id           UUID REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  total             NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL,
  status            TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'
    CHECK (status IN ('pending','processing','shipped','delivered','cancelled')),
  stripe_session_id TEXT,
  shipping_address  JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- 11. coupons — with validation
CREATE TABLE coupons (
  id              UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  code            TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  discount_type   TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (discount_type IN ('percent', 'fixed')),
  discount_value  NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL,
  min_order       NUMERIC(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  max_uses        INT,                        -- nullable = unlimited
  used_count      INT DEFAULT 0,
  active          BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  expires_at      TIMESTAMPTZ,                -- nullable = never expires
  created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);
```

#### B. RLS Policy Patterns — Complete Audit
```sql
-- ✅ is_admin() helper — SECURITY DEFINER
CREATE FUNCTION is_admin() RETURNS boolean
LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER STABLE AS $$
BEGIN
  RETURN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM profiles 
    WHERE id = auth.uid() AND role = 'admin'
  );
END;
$$;
-- ⚠️ STABLE keyword = can be cached within single query

-- ✅ Products — public read, admin write
ALTER TABLE products ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "Anyone can view products" 
  ON products FOR SELECT USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Admins can insert" 
  ON products FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (is_admin());
CREATE POLICY "Admins can update" 
  ON products FOR UPDATE USING (is_admin());
CREATE POLICY "Admins can delete" 
  ON products FOR DELETE USING (is_admin());

-- ✅ Orders — user reads own, admin reads all
CREATE POLICY "Users read own orders" 
  ON orders FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id OR is_admin());
CREATE POLICY "Users create own orders" 
  ON orders FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);
CREATE POLICY "Admins update orders" 
  ON orders FOR UPDATE USING (is_admin());

-- ✅ Wishlist — user-scoped
CREATE POLICY "Users manage own wishlist" 
  ON wishlist FOR ALL USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- ✅ Reviews — public read, user writes own
CREATE POLICY "Anyone reads reviews" 
  ON reviews FOR SELECT USING (true);
CREATE POLICY "Users create reviews" 
  ON reviews FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);
CREATE POLICY "Users update own reviews" 
  ON reviews FOR UPDATE USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- ✅ Contact messages — anyone inserts, admin reads
CREATE POLICY "Anyone can send message" 
  ON contact_messages FOR INSERT WITH CHECK (true);
CREATE POLICY "Admins read messages" 
  ON contact_messages FOR SELECT USING (is_admin());
```
- ئایا هەموو 15 tables RLS enabled ـن؟
- ئایا is_admin() بە SECURITY DEFINER ـە (bypass RLS for role check)؟
- ئایا RLS recursion fix applied ـە (migration 002)؟

#### D. Index Optimization
```sql
-- ✅ Recommended indexes for NexPOS
-- Products — most queried table
CREATE INDEX idx_products_category ON products(category);
CREATE INDEX idx_products_brand ON products(brand);
CREATE INDEX idx_products_price ON products(price);
CREATE INDEX idx_products_hidden ON products(hidden) WHERE hidden = false;
CREATE INDEX idx_products_in_stock ON products(in_stock) WHERE in_stock = true;
CREATE INDEX idx_products_created ON products(created_at DESC);

-- Orders
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user ON orders(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status ON orders(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_orders_created ON orders(created_at DESC);

-- Notifications — unread first
CREATE INDEX idx_notifications_user_unread 
  ON notifications(user_id, is_read) WHERE is_read = false;

-- Reviews
CREATE INDEX idx_reviews_product ON reviews(product_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_reviews_rating ON reviews(product_id, rating);

-- Audit: check for missing indexes
SELECT schemaname, tablename, indexname 
FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname = 'public';
```

#### E. Query Pattern Audit
```typescript
// ✅ Good: Specific columns + pagination
const { data } = await supabase
  .from('products')
  .select('id, name, price, images, brand, category', { count: 'exact' })
  .eq('hidden', false)
  .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
  .range(0, 19);

// ❌ Bad: Select all + no limit
const { data } = await supabase
  .from('products')
  .select('*');  // 🔴 All columns + all rows!

// ✅ Good: Parallel queries
const [productsRes, brandsRes, categoriesRes] = await Promise.all([
  supabase.from('products').select('id, name, price').limit(20),
  supabase.from('brands').select('id, name, logo'),
  supabase.from('categories').select('id, name, slug'),
]);

// ❌ Bad: Sequential queries (N+1)
const { data: orders } = await supabase.from('orders').select('*');
for (const order of orders) {
  const { data: items } = await supabase   // 🔴 N+1!
    .from('order_items').select('*').eq('order_id', order.id);
}

// ✅ Good: Single query with join
const { data: orders } = await supabase
  .from('orders')
  .select('*, order_items(*, products(name, price, images))')
  .eq('user_id', userId);
```

```bash
# 🔍 Database grep patterns

grep -rn "\.from(" src/ --include="*.ts"    # ✅ All Supabase queries
grep -rn "\.rpc(" src/                      # ✅ RPC function calls
grep -rn "service_role" src/                # ⚠️ Admin client usage
grep -rn "SECURITY DEFINER" supabase/       # ⚠️ Privileged functions
grep -rn "ENABLE ROW LEVEL" supabase/       # ✅ RLS status
grep -rn "FOR UPDATE\|FOR SHARE" supabase/  # ✅ Lock usage
```
