### 🗄️ ٤١. پشکنینی Supabase Deep Dive — ئاستی DBA

#### A. Schema Architecture — NexPOS Tables
```sql
-- 15 tables لە NexPOS:
-- 1.  profiles        — User profiles (auto-created via trigger)
-- 2.  products        — Product catalog
-- 3.  categories      — Product categories
-- 4.  brands          — Product brands
-- 5.  orders          — Customer orders
-- 6.  order_items     — Order line items
-- 7.  cart_items      — Server-side cart (optional)
-- 8.  wishlist        — User wishlists
-- 9.  reviews         — Product reviews
-- 10. coupons         — Discount coupons
-- 11. contact_messages — Contact form submissions
-- 12. notifications   — In-app notifications
-- 13. user_addresses  — Shipping addresses
-- 14. inventory_log   — Stock change history
-- 15. trash           — Soft-deleted records
```

#### B. RLS Policy Audit Matrix
```sql
-- ✅ Complete RLS audit — هەموو tables دەبێت!
```
| Table | RLS | SELECT | INSERT | UPDATE | DELETE |
|-------|-----|--------|--------|--------|--------|
| profiles | ✅ | `uid=id OR admin` | Trigger only | `uid=id` | — |
| products | ✅ | `true` | `admin` | `admin` | `admin` |
| categories | ✅ | `true` | `admin` | `admin` | `admin` |
| brands | ✅ | `true` | `admin` | `admin` | `admin` |
| orders | ✅ | `uid=user_id OR admin` | `uid=user_id` | `admin` | — |
| order_items | ✅ | `via orders join` | `via orders` | — | — |
| cart_items | ✅ | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` |
| wishlist | ✅ | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` | — | `uid=user_id` |
| reviews | ✅ | `true` | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` |
| coupons | ✅ | `admin` | `admin` | `admin` | `admin` |
| contact_messages | ✅ | `admin` | `true` | — | `admin` |
| notifications | ✅ | `uid=user_id` | `admin` | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` |
| user_addresses | ✅ | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` | `uid=user_id` |
| inventory_log | ✅ | `admin` | `admin` | — | — |
| trash | ✅ | `admin` | `admin` | — | `admin` |

#### C. Supabase Client Patterns
```typescript
// ✅ 3 client types — هەریەکە بۆ مەبەستێکی تایبەت

// 1️⃣ Browser Client — client components
import { createBrowserClient } from '@supabase/ssr';
export const supabase = createBrowserClient(
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!
);

// 2️⃣ Server Client — server components, API routes
import { createServerClient } from '@supabase/ssr';
export async function createClient() {
  const cookieStore = await cookies();
  return createServerClient(URL, ANON_KEY, {
    cookies: {
      getAll: () => cookieStore.getAll(),
      setAll: (cookies) => {
        cookies.forEach(({ name, value, options }) => {
          cookieStore.set(name, value, options);
        });
      },
    },
  });
}

// 3️⃣ Admin Client — service_role (bypasses RLS!)
import { createClient as createSupabaseClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
export const supabaseAdmin = createSupabaseClient(
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
  process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!  // ⚠️ NEVER expose to client!
);
```
- ئایا browser client تەنها `ANON_KEY` بەکاردەهێنێت؟
- ئایا server client cookie bridge ـی هەیە؟
- ئایا admin client تەنها لە server-side API routes بەکارهاتووە؟
- ⚠️ `service_role` key هەرگیز لە client-side یان `NEXT_PUBLIC_` نابێت!

#### D. Database Triggers
```sql
-- ✅ Auto-create profile on signup
CREATE TRIGGER on_auth_user_created
  AFTER INSERT ON auth.users
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION handle_new_user();

-- ✅ Auto-update updated_at
CREATE TRIGGER set_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON products
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at();

CREATE FUNCTION update_updated_at() RETURNS trigger AS $$
BEGIN
  NEW.updated_at = now();
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

-- ✅ Trash purge — auto-delete after 30 days
CREATE FUNCTION purge_expired_trash() RETURNS void AS $$
  DELETE FROM trash WHERE expires_at < now();
$$ LANGUAGE sql;

-- ✅ Cron job for trash purge (Supabase pg_cron)
SELECT cron.schedule('purge-trash', '0 3 * * *', 'SELECT purge_expired_trash()');
```

#### E. Migration Strategy
```
supabase/
├── schema.sql                     # ئاستی ئەسڵی schema
├── seed-brands.sql                # Initial data
├── migrations/
│   ├── 001_fix_notify_and_policies.sql
│   ├── 002_fix_recursion.sql      # RLS recursion fix
│   ├── 003_new_preferences.sql
│   ├── 20260403_stock_subscribers.sql
│   ├── admin-features.sql
│   ├── phase1-fixes.sql
│   ├── storage-policies.sql
│   ├── trash.sql                  # Soft delete system
│   └── ...
```
- ئایا migrations بە version control ـدان؟
- ئایا هەر migration rollback plan ـی هەیە؟
- ئایا seed data بۆ development هەیە؟
- ئایا migration naming convention consistent ـە؟

### 🛒 ٤٢. پشکنینی E-Commerce Patterns — ئاستی پسپۆڕ

#### A. Cart System Architecture
```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              Cart System                  │
│                                          │
│  ┌──────────────────────────┐            │
│  │    Zustand Cart Store     │            │
│  │  (localStorage persist)   │            │
│  │                          │            │
│  │  addItem()    ──────▶ ┌───────────┐  │
│  │  removeItem() ──────▶ │ Server    │  │
│  │  updateQty()  ──────▶ │ Validation│  │
│  │  clearCart()          │ at        │  │
│  │                       │ Checkout  │  │
│  │  totalItems()         └───────────┘  │
│  │  totalPrice()                        │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────┘│
│                                          │
│  Benefits:                               │
│  ✅ Instant UI (no server round-trip)    │
│  ✅ Works offline / without auth         │
│  ✅ Persists across sessions             │
│  ✅ Server validates at checkout         │
└──────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

#### B. Order Lifecycle
```
pending ──▶ processing ──▶ shipped ──▶ delivered
   │              │            │
   ▼              ▼            ▼
cancelled    cancelled    (no cancel)
```
```typescript
// ✅ Valid status transitions
const VALID_TRANSITIONS: Record<string, string[]> = {
  pending: ['processing', 'cancelled'],
  processing: ['shipped', 'cancelled'],
  shipped: ['delivered'],
  delivered: [],  // final state
  cancelled: [],  // final state
};

function canTransition(current: string, next: string): boolean {
  return VALID_TRANSITIONS[current]?.includes(next) ?? false;
}
```

#### C. Price Formatting — Multi-Currency
```typescript
// ✅ Price formatter بۆ هەموو currencies
const CURRENCIES: Record<string, { symbol: string; decimals: number; position: 'before' | 'after' }> = {
  USD: { symbol: '$', decimals: 2, position: 'before' },
  IQD: { symbol: 'د.ع', decimals: 0, position: 'after' },
  EUR: { symbol: '€', decimals: 2, position: 'before' },
  TRY: { symbol: '₺', decimals: 2, position: 'before' },
};

function formatPrice(amount: number, currency: string = 'USD'): string {
  const config = CURRENCIES[currency] || CURRENCIES.USD;
  const formatted = amount.toLocaleString('en-US', {
    minimumFractionDigits: config.decimals,
    maximumFractionDigits: config.decimals,
  });
  
  return config.position === 'before'
    ? `${config.symbol}${formatted}`
    : `${formatted} ${config.symbol}`;
}

// formatPrice(25000, 'IQD')  → "25,000 د.ع"
// formatPrice(49.99, 'USD')  → "$49.99"
// formatPrice(199.50, 'TRY') → "₺199.50"
```

#### D. Inventory Management
```typescript
// ✅ Stock check at checkout — atomic
const { data: product, error } = await supabase
  .from('products')
  .select('id, price, in_stock, stock_count')
  .eq('id', itemId)
  .single();

if (!product?.in_stock || (product.stock_count !== null && product.stock_count < requestedQty)) {
  throw new Error(`${product?.name || 'Product'} is out of stock`);
}

// ✅ Stock alert — notify subscribers when back in stock
const { data: subscribers } = await supabase
  .from('stock_subscribers')
  .select('*')
  .eq('product_id', productId)
  .eq('notified', false);

for (const sub of subscribers || []) {
  await sendStockAlert(sub);
  await supabase.from('stock_subscribers')
    .update({ notified: true })
    .eq('id', sub.id);
}
```

### 🚨 ٤٣. پشکنینی Error Handling & Recovery — ئاستی Production

#### A. Error Boundary Architecture — Next.js App Router
```typescript
// ✅ app/error.tsx — Global Error Boundary
'use client';

export default function GlobalError({
  error,
  reset,
}: {
  error: Error & { digest?: string };
  reset: () => void;
}) {
  useEffect(() => {
    // Report to error tracking service
    reportError(error);
  }, [error]);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4" dir="rtl">
      <div className="text-center max-w-md">
        <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-red-500 mb-4">⚠️ هەڵەیەک ڕوویدا</h1>
        <p className="text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 mb-6">
          ببوورە، کێشەیەک هەیە. تکایە دووبارە هەوڵ بدەرەوە.
        </p>
        {error.digest && (
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-4">
            کۆدی هەڵە: {error.digest}
          </p>
        )}
        <div className="flex gap-4 justify-center">
          <button onClick={reset} className="btn-primary">
            دووبارە هەوڵبدەرەوە
          </button>
          <a href="/" className="btn-secondary">
            گەڕانەوە بۆ سەرەکی
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ✅ app/not-found.tsx — Custom 404
export default function NotFound() {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-4" dir="rtl">
      <div className="text-center">
        <h1 className="text-8xl font-bold text-gray-200 dark:text-gray-800">404</h1>
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mt-4">لاپەڕەکە نەدۆزرایەوە</h2>
        <p className="text-gray-500 mt-2">ئەو لاپەڕەیەی بەدوایدا دەگەڕێیت بوونی نییە.</p>
        <a href="/" className="btn-primary mt-6 inline-block">
          گەڕانەوە بۆ سەرەکی
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

```
📋 Error Boundary Hierarchy:

app/
├── error.tsx         ← Global error (catches everything below)
├── not-found.tsx     ← Global 404
├── (store)/
│   ├── error.tsx     ← Store-specific errors
│   ├── loading.tsx   ← Store loading skeleton
│   └── products/
│       ├── error.tsx ← Products-specific error
│       └── [slug]/
│           └── error.tsx ← Single product error
├── admin/
│   ├── error.tsx     ← Admin-specific error (different UI)
│   ├── loading.tsx   ← Admin loading
│   └── products/
│       └── error.tsx
└── (auth)/
    └── error.tsx     ← Auth-specific error
```
- ئایا `error.tsx` لە root level هەیە؟
- ئایا `error.tsx` لە هەر route group ـێکدا هەیە (store, admin, auth)؟
- ئایا `not-found.tsx` customize کراوە بە UI ـی پڕۆژە؟
- ئایا error digest (unique ID) نیشان دادرێت بۆ debugging؟
- ئایا user-friendly هەڵەکان بە کوردی نوسراون؟

#### B. API Error Response Standard
```typescript
// ✅ Standardized API error response
type APIError = {
  error: {
    code: string;          // machine-readable: 'PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND'
    message: string;       // human-readable (Kurdish)
    details?: unknown;     // optional extra info
    status: number;        // HTTP status code
  };
};

// ✅ Error factory functions
function badRequest(message: string, code?: string) {
  return NextResponse.json(
    { error: { code: code ?? 'BAD_REQUEST', message, status: 400 } },
    { status: 400 }
  );
}

function unauthorized(message = 'تکایە چوونەژوورەوە بکە') {
  return NextResponse.json(
    { error: { code: 'UNAUTHORIZED', message, status: 401 } },
    { status: 401 }
  );
}

function notFound(message = 'نەدۆزرایەوە') {
  return NextResponse.json(
    { error: { code: 'NOT_FOUND', message, status: 404 } },
    { status: 404 }
  );
}

function serverError(message = 'هەڵەی سێرڤەر') {
  return NextResponse.json(
    { error: { code: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', message, status: 500 } },
    { status: 500 }
  );
}

// ✅ Usage
export async function GET(request: Request) {
  const { data: product, error } = await supabase
    .from('products').select('*').eq('slug', slug).single();
  
  if (error || !product) return notFound('بەرهەمەکە نەدۆزرایەوە');
  if (product.is_hidden) return notFound('بەرهەمەکە بەردەست نییە');
  
  return NextResponse.json(product);
}
```
- ئایا API error responses consistent format ـیان هەیە؟
- ئایا error codes machine-readable ـن (PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND, etc.)؟
- ئایا HTTP status codes ـی correct بەکارهاتووە (400, 401, 403, 404, 429, 500)؟
- ئایا sensitive info (stack traces, DB errors) leaked نییە لە production؟

#### C. Network Error Handling & Retry
```typescript
// ✅ Fetch with retry + exponential backoff
async function fetchWithRetry(
  url: string,
  options?: RequestInit,
  { maxRetries = 3, baseDelay = 1000 } = {}
): Promise<Response> {
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= maxRetries; attempt++) {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(url, {
        ...options,
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000), // 10s timeout
      });
      
      // Don't retry 4xx errors (client errors)
      if (response.status >= 400 && response.status < 500) return response;
      
      // Retry 5xx errors (server errors)
      if (!response.ok && attempt < maxRetries) {
        const delay = baseDelay * Math.pow(2, attempt); // 1s, 2s, 4s
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, delay));
        continue;
      }
      
      return response;
    } catch (error) {
      if (attempt === maxRetries) throw error;
      const delay = baseDelay * Math.pow(2, attempt);
      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, delay));
    }
  }
  throw new Error('Max retries exceeded');
}

// ✅ Usage
try {
  const response = await fetchWithRetry('/api/orders');
  const data = await response.json();
} catch (error) {
  if (error.name === 'AbortError') {
    showToast('زمان تێپەڕی — تکایە دووبارە هەوڵبدەرەوە', 'error');
  } else if (!navigator.onLine) {
    showToast('ئینتەرنێت نییە', 'warning');
  } else {
    showToast('هەڵەیەک ڕوویدا', 'error');
  }
}
```
- ئایا network errors بە user-friendly messages handle دەکرێن؟
- ئایا retry logic بە exponential backoff هەیە؟
- ئایا request timeout هەیە (AbortSignal.timeout)؟
- ئایا offline state detected و handled دەکرێت؟

#### D. Error Reporting — Sentry Integration
```typescript
// ✅ Sentry setup بۆ Next.js
// sentry.client.config.ts
import * as Sentry from '@sentry/nextjs';

Sentry.init({
  dsn: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN,
  environment: process.env.NODE_ENV,
  tracesSampleRate: 0.1,     // Sample 10% of transactions
  replaysSessionSampleRate: 0.01, // Record 1% of sessions
  replaysOnErrorSampleRate: 1.0,  // Record 100% of error sessions
  
  // Filter sensitive data
  beforeSend(event) {
    // Remove user PII
    if (event.user) {
      delete event.user.email;
      delete event.user.ip_address;
    }
    return event;
  },
  
  // Ignore known non-errors
  ignoreErrors: [
    'ResizeObserver loop',
    'Network request failed',
    'AbortError',
    'ChunkLoadError',
  ],
});
```
- ئایا error tracking service (Sentry) بەکارهاتووە؟
- ئایا PII scrubbed ـە لە error reports (email, IP, etc.)؟
- ئایا sample rates مناسبن (نەک 100% بۆ هەمووشت)؟
- ئایا source maps uploaded ـن بۆ readable stack traces؟

### 🧩 ٤٤. پشکنینی Component Architecture — ئاستی ئارکیتێکت

#### A. Server vs Client Component Decision Tree
```
📊 بڕیاربدە: Server Component یان Client Component?

                        ئایا ئەم بەشە پێویستیەتی...
                              │
              ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
              │                               │
        بەکارهێنەر          داتای سێرڤەر     
        interaction?         یان auth?       
              │                               │
         ┌────┴────┐                    Server Component ✅
         │         │                   (async function)
     بەڵێ        نەخێر               
         │         │                   نموونە:
    Client    Server                  - Layout
    Component  Component              - Product list (بە database query)
    ('use client')                    - Admin dashboard
         │                            - Order history
         │
    نموونە:
    - AddToCartButton (onClick)
    - SearchInput (onChange)
    - ThemeToggle (state)
    - Mobile menu (useState)
    - Form (validation state)
```

```typescript
// ✅ Server Component — data fetching لە server
// app/(store)/products/page.tsx
export default async function ProductsPage() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: products } = await supabase
    .from('products')
    .select('*, brands(*), categories(*)')
    .eq('is_hidden', false)
    .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
  
  return (
    <main>
      <h1>بەرهەمەکان</h1>
      {/* ✅ Server Component — no 'use client' needed */}
      <ProductGrid products={products ?? []} />
    </main>
  );
}

// ✅ Client Component — user interaction needed
// components/shop/AddToCartButton.tsx
'use client';
export function AddToCartButton({ product }: { product: Product }) {
  const addItem = useCartStore(s => s.addItem);
  const t = useT();
  
  return (
    <button onClick={() => addItem(product, 1)}>
      {t.productCard.addToCart}
    </button>
  );
}

// ✅ Composition Pattern — Server wraps Client
// Server Component بۆ data, Client Component بۆ interactions
function ProductCard({ product }: { product: Product }) {
  return (
    <div className="card">
      {/* Server-rendered content */}
      <Image src={product.images[0]} alt={product.name} />
      <h3>{product.name}</h3>
      <p>{formatPrice(product.price)}</p>
      
      {/* Client interactive island */}
      <AddToCartButton product={product} />
    </div>
  );
}
```
- ئایا Server Components بۆ data fetching و static UI بەکارهاتووە؟
- ئایا Client Components تەنها بۆ interactivity ـە (`'use client'`)؟
- ئایا `'use client'` بە lowest possible level دانراوە (leaf components)؟
- ئایا props serializable ـن (نەک functions/classes بۆ Server Components)؟

#### B. AdminShell Pattern — Sidebar + Content
```typescript
// ✅ AdminShell pattern — responsive admin layout
'use client';

export function AdminShell({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const t = useT();
  
  // ✅ Close sidebar on route change
  useEffect(() => {
    setSidebarOpen(false);
  }, [pathname]);
  
  // ✅ Close on Escape key
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleEscape = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'Escape') setSidebarOpen(false);
    };
    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleEscape);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleEscape);
  }, []);
  
  return (
    <div className="flex min-h-screen">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <aside className={`fixed inset-y-0 start-0 z-40 w-64 transform transition-transform
        lg:translate-x-0 lg:static lg:inset-auto
        ${sidebarOpen ? 'translate-x-0' : '-translate-x-full rtl:translate-x-full'}`}>
        <nav className="flex flex-col h-full bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
          {navItems.map(item => (
            <Link
              key={item.href}
              href={item.href}
              className={`flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg ${
                pathname === item.href ? 'bg-white/10' : 'hover:bg-white/5'
              }`}
            >
              <item.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span>{item.label}</span>
            </Link>
          ))}
        </nav>
      </aside>
      
      {/* Overlay */}
      {sidebarOpen && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-30 lg:hidden" onClick={() => setSidebarOpen(false)} />
      )}
      
      {/* Content */}
      <main className="flex-1 p-4 lg:p-8">{children}</main>
    </div>
  );
}
```
- ئایا admin layout responsive ـە (sidebar → drawer لە mobile)؟
- ئایا sidebar لە route change داخرێت؟
- ئایا Escape key sidebar دادەخات؟
- ئایا active route لە sidebar highlight دەکرێت؟
- ئایا RTL transform direction correct ـە (translate-x-full vs -translate-x-full)؟

#### C. Component Composition Patterns
```typescript
// ✅ Pattern 1: Compound Components
// بەکارهێنەر: <Tabs><Tab /><Tab /></Tabs>
function Tabs({ children, defaultValue }: TabsProps) {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(defaultValue);
  return (
    <TabsContext.Provider value={{ activeTab, setActiveTab }}>
      {children}
    </TabsContext.Provider>
  );
}

function TabList({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return <div role="tablist" className="flex border-b">{children}</div>;
}

function Tab({ value, children }: { value: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const { activeTab, setActiveTab } = useTabsContext();
  return (
    <button
      role="tab"
      aria-selected={activeTab === value}
      onClick={() => setActiveTab(value)}
      className={activeTab === value ? 'border-b-2 border-primary' : ''}
    >
      {children}
    </button>
  );
}

function TabContent({ value, children }: { value: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
  const { activeTab } = useTabsContext();
  if (activeTab !== value) return null;
  return <div role="tabpanel">{children}</div>;
}

// ✅ Pattern 2: Render Props (بۆ flexible rendering)
function DataList<T>({ items, renderItem, emptyMessage }: {
  items: T[];
  renderItem: (item: T, index: number) => React.ReactNode;
  emptyMessage?: string;
}) {
  if (items.length === 0) return <p>{emptyMessage ?? 'هیچ نەدۆزرایەوە'}</p>;
  return <ul>{items.map(renderItem)}</ul>;
}

// ✅ Pattern 3: Children as function (headless component)
function Toggle({ children }: { children: (props: { isOpen: boolean; toggle: () => void }) => React.ReactNode }) {
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
  return <>{children({ isOpen, toggle: () => setIsOpen(!isOpen) })}</>;
}
```
- ئایا compound components بۆ complex UI (Tabs, Accordion, Dropdown) بەکارهاتووە؟
- ئایا render props بۆ flexible rendering بەکارهاتووە؟
- ئایا headless components بۆ reusable logic بەکارهاتووە؟

### 📡 ٤٥. پشکنینی Data Fetching & Caching — ئاستی پسپۆڕ

#### A. Server Component Data Fetching
```typescript
// ✅ Pattern 1: Direct database query (Server Component)
// app/(store)/products/[slug]/page.tsx
export default async function ProductPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ slug: string }> }) {
  const { slug } = await params;
  const supabase = await createClient();
  
  // Parallel data fetching — بۆ خێرایی
  const [product, relatedProducts, reviews] = await Promise.all([
    supabase.from('products').select('*, brands(*), categories(*)').eq('slug', slug).single(),
    supabase.from('products').select('*').limit(4),
    supabase.from('reviews').select('*, profiles(full_name, avatar_url)').eq('product_slug', slug),
  ]);
  
  if (!product.data) notFound();
  
  return (
    <div>
      <ProductDetail product={product.data} />
      <ReviewsList reviews={reviews.data ?? []} />
      <RelatedProducts products={relatedProducts.data ?? []} />
    </div>
  );
}

// ✅ generateMetadata — SEO metadata per product
export async function generateMetadata({ params }: { params: Promise<{ slug: string }> }): Promise<Metadata> {
  const { slug } = await params;
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: product } = await supabase
    .from('products').select('name, description, images').eq('slug', slug).single();
  
  if (!product) return { title: 'بەرهەم نەدۆزرایەوە' };
  
  return {
    title: product.name,
    description: product.description?.slice(0, 160),
    openGraph: {
      title: product.name,
      description: product.description ?? '',
      images: product.images?.[0] ? [{ url: product.images[0] }] : [],
    },
  };
}
```

#### B. Caching Strategies — Route Segment Config
```typescript
// ✅ app/(store)/page.tsx — ISR (Revalidate every 60 seconds)
export const revalidate = 60; // Revalidate at most every 60 seconds

// ✅ app/(store)/products/page.tsx — Dynamic (always fresh)
export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'; // No caching — always fresh data

// ✅ app/api/products/[id]/route.ts — Cache API responses
export async function GET(request: Request, { params }) {
  const product = await getProduct(params.id);
  
  return NextResponse.json(product, {
    headers: {
      'Cache-Control': 'public, s-maxage=3600, stale-while-revalidate=86400',
      // CDN caches for 1 hour, serves stale for 24 hours while revalidating
    },
  });
}

// ✅ Revalidation — on-demand (after admin update)
// app/api/admin/products/route.ts
import { revalidatePath, revalidateTag } from 'next/cache';

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  // ... create product
  
  // Revalidate product pages
  revalidatePath('/products');         // Revalidate products list
  revalidatePath(`/products/${slug}`); // Revalidate specific product
  revalidateTag('products');           // Revalidate by tag
  
  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}
```

```
📊 Caching Decision Tree:

ئەم لاپەڕەیە...
     │
     ├── Static content (homepage, about) → ISR (revalidate: 3600)
     │
     ├── Product list (changes daily) → ISR (revalidate: 60)
     │
     ├── Product detail → ISR + on-demand revalidation
     │
     ├── User-specific (cart, orders, settings) → dynamic: 'force-dynamic'
     │
     ├── Admin pages → dynamic: 'force-dynamic' (always fresh)
     │
     └── API routes → Cache-Control headers + s-maxage
```
- ئایا revalidation strategy مناسبە بۆ هەر route ـێک؟
- ئایا on-demand revalidation بەکارهاتووە پاش admin changes؟
- ئایا dynamic routes بۆ user-specific content ـن؟
- ئایا parallel data fetching بە `Promise.all` بەکارهاتووە؟

#### C. Client-Side Data Fetching — SWR/React Query Patterns
```typescript
// ✅ Zustand + Supabase — no extra fetching library needed
// NexPOS pattern: Zustand بۆ client state, Supabase بۆ server state

// Cart: client-only (Zustand persist to localStorage)
const cart = useCartStore(s => s.items);

// Wishlist: server state (Supabase + local cache)
function useWishlist() {
  const [items, setItems] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const supabase = createClient();
  
  useEffect(() => {
    supabase.from('wishlist')
      .select('product_id')
      .then(({ data }) => {
        setItems(data?.map(w => w.product_id) ?? []);
        setLoading(false);
      });
  }, []);
  
  return { items, loading };
}

// ✅ ئەگەر SWR/React Query بەکاربهێنرێت:
// npm i swr
import useSWR from 'swr';

const fetcher = (url: string) => fetch(url).then(r => r.json());

function useProducts(category?: string) {
  const { data, error, isLoading, mutate } = useSWR(
    `/api/products?${category ? `category=${category}` : ''}`,
    fetcher,
    {
      revalidateOnFocus: false,    // Don't refetch on tab focus
      dedupingInterval: 60000,     // Dedupe requests within 1 minute
      errorRetryCount: 3,          // Retry 3 times on error
    }
  );
  
  return { products: data, error, isLoading, refresh: mutate };
}
```
- ئایا client data fetching بە consistent pattern ـە؟
- ئایا loading states handle دەکرێن؟
- ئایا error states handle دەکرێن؟
- ئایا deduplication هەیە بۆ duplicate requests؟

### 🔗 ٤٦. پشکنینی API Design Patterns — ئاستی ئارکیتێکت

#### A. Route Handler Patterns — NexPOS Style
```typescript
// ✅ Standard API route pattern (NexPOS checkout route style)
// app/api/[resource]/route.ts

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  // 1️⃣ Rate Limiting
  const ip = getClientIP(request);
  const rateLimitResult = checkoutRateLimiter.check(ip);
  if (!rateLimitResult.allowed) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'زۆر داوات کردووە — تکایە چاوەڕوان بە' },
      { status: 429, headers: { 'Retry-After': String(rateLimitResult.reset) } }
    );
  }
  
  // 2️⃣ Authentication
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return unauthorized();
  
  // 3️⃣ Input Validation (Zod)
  const body = await request.json();
  const parsed = requestSchema.safeParse(body);
  if (!parsed.success) {
    return badRequest(parsed.error.issues[0].message);
  }
  
  // 4️⃣ Authorization (role check if needed)
  if (requiresAdmin) {
    const { data: profile } = await supabase
      .from('profiles').select('role').eq('id', user.id).single();
    if (profile?.role !== 'admin') return forbidden();
  }
  
  // 5️⃣ Business Logic
  try {
    const result = await processRequest(parsed.data, user);
    return NextResponse.json(result);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[API Error]', error);
    return serverError();
  }
}
```

```
📋 API Route Checklist بۆ هەر endpoint:

□ Rate limiting (IP-based sliding window)
□ Authentication check (supabase.auth.getUser)
□ Input validation (Zod schema)
□ Authorization check (role-based if needed)
□ Server-side data validation (never trust client)
□ Error handling (try/catch + structured errors)
□ Audit logging (for sensitive operations)
□ Response headers (Cache-Control, Content-Type)
□ CORS headers (if needed for external access)
```
- ئایا هەموو API routes ئەم pattern ـەیان هەیە؟
- ئایا rate limiting لەسەر هەموو مەترسیدارەکان هەیە (checkout, login, register)؟
- ئایا Zod validation بۆ هەموو inputs هەیە؟

#### B. Webhook Handler Pattern — Stripe
```typescript
// ✅ app/api/webhook/route.ts — NexPOS Stripe webhook pattern
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  // 1️⃣ Read raw body (required for signature verification)
  const body = await request.text();
  const signature = request.headers.get('stripe-signature');
  
  if (!signature) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Missing signature' }, { status: 400 });
  }
  
  // 2️⃣ Verify signature — ئەگەر نەتوانرێت، ئەوا message tampered ـە
  let event: Stripe.Event;
  try {
    event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, signature, WEBHOOK_SECRET);
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Webhook signature verification failed:', err);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid signature' }, { status: 400 });
  }
  
  // 3️⃣ Handle event — idempotent (safe to receive duplicates)
  const supabase = createAdminClient(); // SERVICE_ROLE — bypass RLS
  
  switch (event.type) {
    case 'checkout.session.completed': {
      const session = event.data.object as Stripe.Checkout.Session;
      const orderId = session.metadata?.orderId;
      
      // ✅ Idempotent update — only update if still pending
      const { data: order } = await supabase
        .from('orders')
        .update({ status: 'processing', paid_at: new Date().toISOString() })
        .eq('id', orderId)
        .eq('status', 'pending') // ← ئەمە idempotency ـیە!
        .select()
        .single();
      
      if (order) {
        // Multi-channel notifications
        await Promise.allSettled([
          sendOrderConfirmation(order),       // Email (Resend)
          createInAppNotification(order),      // In-app notification
          sendSMSNotification(order),          // SMS (optional)
        ]);
      }
      break;
    }
    
    case 'payment_intent.payment_failed': {
      // Handle failed payment
      break;
    }
  }
  
  // 4️⃣ Always return 200 to acknowledge receipt
  return NextResponse.json({ received: true });
}
```
- ئایا webhook signature verification هەیە (constructEvent)؟
- ئایا raw body بەکارهاتووە (نەک parsed JSON) بۆ signature؟
- ئایا idempotent processing هەیە (`.eq('status', 'pending')`)؟
- ئایا SERVICE_ROLE بەکارهاتووە بۆ bypass RLS؟
- ئایا `Promise.allSettled` بەکارهاتووە بۆ multi-channel notifications؟
- ئایا response = 200 هەمیشە (even on business logic failure)؟

#### C. Input Validation Patterns — Zod
```typescript
// ✅ Zod validation schemas بۆ NexPOS
import { z } from 'zod';

// Shipping address validation (from checkout route)
const shippingAddressSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(2, 'ناوەکەت تکایە').max(100),
  phone: z.string().regex(/^\+964\d{10}$/, 'ژمارەی مۆبایل نادروستە (+964XXXXXXXXXX)'),
  city: z.string().min(2, 'شارەکە تکایە').max(50),
  address: z.string().min(5, 'ناونیشان تکایە').max(200),
  notes: z.string().max(500).optional(),
});

// Checkout items validation  
const checkoutItemSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().uuid('ID ـی بەرهەم نادروستە'),
  quantity: z.number().int('بڕ دەبێت تەواو بێت').min(1, 'لانیکەم ١').max(99, 'زۆرترین ٩٩'),
});

const checkoutSchema = z.object({
  items: z.array(checkoutItemSchema).min(1, 'سەبەتە بەتاڵە'),
  shippingAddress: shippingAddressSchema,
  couponCode: z.string().optional(),
});

// ✅ Product creation (admin)
const createProductSchema = z.object({
  name: z.string().min(2).max(200),
  slug: z.string().regex(/^[a-z0-9-]+$/),
  price: z.number().positive('نرخ دەبێت positive بێت'),
  description: z.string().max(5000).optional(),
  images: z.array(z.string().url()).min(1, 'لانیکەم وێنەیەک'),
  category_id: z.string().uuid(),
  brand_id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
  stock: z.number().int().min(0).default(0),
});
```
- ئایا Zod schemas بۆ هەموو API inputs هەیە؟
- ئایا Kurdish error messages لە Zod schemas دان؟
- ئایا phone validation بە +964 pattern ـە؟
- ئایا separate schemas بۆ create vs update هەن؟

### 🇰🇷 ٤٧. پشکنینی Kurdish E-Commerce UX — تایبەت بە بازاڕی کوردستان

#### A. Payment Methods — عێراق و کوردستان
```
📊 Payment Methods بۆ بازاڕی کوردستان:

| پارەدان | پێویستن؟ | Notes |
|----------|----------|-------|
| Cash on Delivery (COD) | 🔴 پێویستە | ئامرازی سەرەکی — ~70% لە داواکارییەکان |
| FIB / FIB Mobile | 🔴 پێویستە | بانکی سەرەکی کوردستان |
| FastPay | 🟡 باشترە | بەرفراوان لە هەولێر |
| QiCard | 🟡 باشترە | کارتی ئەلێکترۆنی عێراقی |
| ZainCash | 🟢 باشە | بۆ زەین mobile money |
| Stripe / Card | 🟡 باشترە | بۆ diaspora و foreign customers |
| PayPal | 🟢 Optional | نییە لە عێراق — بۆ دەرەوە |
```

```typescript
// ✅ Payment method selection component
function PaymentMethodSelector() {
  const t = useT();
  
  const methods = [
    { id: 'cod', label: 'پارەدانی دەستی (COD)', icon: '💵', 
      description: 'پارە بدە کاتێک بەرهەمەکە دەگات' },
    { id: 'fib', label: 'FIB Mobile', icon: '🏦',
      description: 'پارەدان بە ئەپی FIB' },
    { id: 'fastpay', label: 'FastPay', icon: '⚡',
      description: 'پارەدانی خێرا بە FastPay' },
    { id: 'stripe', label: 'کارتی بانک (Visa/Mastercard)', icon: '💳',
      description: 'پارەدان بە کارتی بانک — Stripe' },
  ];
  
  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      <h3 className="font-bold">{t.checkout.paymentMethod}</h3>
      {methods.map(method => (
        <label key={method.id} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 border rounded-lg cursor-pointer
          has-[:checked]:border-primary has-[:checked]:bg-primary/5">
          <input type="radio" name="payment" value={method.id} className="accent-primary" />
          <span className="text-2xl">{method.icon}</span>
          <div>
            <div className="font-medium">{method.label}</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">{method.description}</div>
          </div>
        </label>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```
- ئایا پارەدانی دەستی (COD) هەیە؟ (ئەمە مەبەستی سەرەکیە لە کوردستان)
- ئایا پارەدان بە FIB/FastPay هەیە بۆ mobile payments؟
- ئایا Stripe بۆ کارتی بانک هەیە بۆ customers ـی دەرەوە؟

#### C. Currency & Pricing — IQD (دینار عێراقی)
```typescript
// ✅ IQD pricing patterns
// IQD بە 1000 increments ـە عادەتەن (نەک cents)
// مثلاً: 25,000 IQD، 50,000 IQD، 100,000 IQD

function formatIQD(amount: number): string {
  // No decimals — IQD doesn't use fils in practice
  return new Intl.NumberFormat('ar-IQ', {
    style: 'currency',
    currency: 'IQD',
    minimumFractionDigits: 0,
    maximumFractionDigits: 0,
  }).format(amount);
}

// ✅ Multi-currency support (from preferences.tsx)
function formatPrice(amount: number, currency: string): string {
  const currencyFormats: Record<string, { locale: string; decimals: number }> = {
    IQD: { locale: 'ar-IQ', decimals: 0 },
    USD: { locale: 'en-US', decimals: 2 },
    EUR: { locale: 'de-DE', decimals: 2 },
    TRY: { locale: 'tr-TR', decimals: 2 },
  };
  
  const fmt = currencyFormats[currency] ?? currencyFormats.USD;
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(fmt.locale, {
    style: 'currency',
    currency,
    minimumFractionDigits: fmt.decimals,
    maximumFractionDigits: fmt.decimals,
  }).format(amount);
}
```
- ئایا IQD بەبێ decimals نیشان دادرێت (نەک 25,000.00)؟
- ئایا multi-currency support هەیە (IQD, USD, EUR, TRY)؟
- ئایا exchange rate بەڕۆژ ـە؟ (6h cache from preferences.tsx)

#### D. Trust Signals — بازاڕی کوردستان
```
📋 Trust Signals بۆ بەکارهێنەرە کوردەکان:

□ پارەدانی دەستی (COD) — ئەمە trust ـی سەرەکیە
□ ژمارەی مۆبایل بۆ پەیوەندی (+964 750 XXX XXXX)
□ ناونیشانی فیزیکی فرۆشگا (ئەگەر هەیە)
□ گەڕانەوەی بەرهەم (return policy) بە کوردی
□ باسکردنی شارەکانی گەیاندن بە ناو
□ نیشانی social media (Instagram, Facebook — زۆر بەکارهاتووە)
□ هەڵسەنگاندنی بەکارهێنەران (reviews) بە ناو و وێنە
□ گەیاندنی خێرا (express delivery option)
□ SSL certificate indicator (🔒)
□ وێنەی ڕاستەقینە (nەک stock photos)
```
- ئایا COD option بە بەرچاوی نیشان دادرێت لە homepage/product pages؟
- ئایا phone number بۆ ئاسانی پەیوەندی هەیە (WhatsApp link)؟
- ئایا social media links هەن (Instagram ئامرازی سەرەکیە لە کوردستان)؟
- ئایا reviews system بە ناوی ڕاستەقینە هەیە؟

### 🚀 ٤٨. پشکنینی Production Readiness — Pre-Deploy Checklist

#### A. Security Hardening Checklist
```
📋 ئەمنیەت — پێش deploy:

 Authentication & Authorization:
□ Supabase RLS enabled on ALL tables
□ Admin routes double-gated (middleware + layout)
□ Protected routes redirect to /login
□ API routes check auth before processing
□ Service role key NOT in client-side code

 HTTP Security Headers:
□ Content-Security-Policy (strict)
□ X-Frame-Options: DENY
□ X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
□ Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS 2 years + preload)
□ Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
□ Permissions-Policy (camera/mic disabled)
□ poweredByHeader: false

 Input Security:
□ All API inputs validated (Zod)
□ File uploads: type, size, magic bytes validation
□ SQL injection prevented (parameterized queries via Supabase)
□ XSS prevented (React auto-escaping + CSP)
□ CSRF prevention (SameSite cookies)
□ Rate limiting on auth + checkout + contact endpoints

 Secrets Management:
□ .env.local in .gitignore
□ .env.example exists for developers
□ NEXT_PUBLIC_ only for client-safe values
□ Stripe webhook secret verified
□ Supabase service role key only server-side
```

#### B. Performance Budget
```
📊 Performance Targets — MUST PASS:

| Metric | Target | Tool |
|--------|--------|------|
| Lighthouse Performance | > 90 | Lighthouse CI |
| First Load JS | < 100kB | Bundle Analyzer |
| LCP | < 2.5s | WebPageTest |
| INP | < 200ms | Chrome UX Report |
| CLS | < 0.1 | Lighthouse |
| TTFB | < 800ms | WebPageTest |
| Time to Interactive | < 3.5s | Lighthouse |
| Total Bundle Size | < 500kB | @next/bundle-analyzer |

📋 Performance Checklist:
□ Images optimized (next/image, WebP/AVIF)
□ Fonts preloaded + font-display: swap
□ Third-party scripts deferred
□ CSS purged (Tailwind JIT)
□ Code splitting (route-based + dynamic imports)
□ Server Components used where possible
□ React Compiler enabled
□ No layout shifts (CLS < 0.1)
```

#### C. Environment Verification
```typescript
// ✅ env.ts pattern — run at startup (NexPOS pattern)
const requiredEnvVars = [
  { key: 'NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL', required: true },
  { key: 'NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY', required: true },
  { key: 'SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY', required: true, productionOnly: false },
  { key: 'STRIPE_SECRET_KEY', required: true },
  { key: 'STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET', required: true },
  { key: 'RESEND_API_KEY', required: false },
  { key: 'NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL', required: true },
];

export function validateEnv() {
  const missing: string[] = [];
  
  for (const { key, required, productionOnly } of requiredEnvVars) {
    if (productionOnly && process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') continue;
    if (required && !process.env[key]) missing.push(key);
  }
  
  if (missing.length > 0) {
    console.error(`❌ Missing environment variables: ${missing.join(', ')}`);
    if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') {
      throw new Error('Missing required environment variables');
    }
  }
}
```

### 💳 ٤٩. پشکنینی Stripe & Payment Security — ئاستی PCI

#### A. Stripe Integration Best Practices
```typescript
// ✅ Stripe checkout session creation (NexPOS pattern)
const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
  mode: 'payment',
  payment_method_types: ['card'],
  customer_email: user.email,
  
  line_items: validatedItems.map(item => ({
    price_data: {
      currency: 'usd',
      product_data: {
        name: item.name,
        images: item.images?.slice(0, 1),
      },
      unit_amount: Math.round(item.price * 100), // Cents!
    },
    quantity: item.quantity,
  })),
  
  metadata: {
    orderId: order.id,
    userId: user.id,
  },
  
  success_url: `${SITE_URL}/orders?success=true&order=${order.id}`,
  cancel_url: `${SITE_URL}/cart?cancelled=true`,
  
  // ✅ Security settings
  payment_intent_data: {
    capture_method: 'automatic',
    statement_descriptor: 'NEXPOS',
  },
  
  // ✅ Expire after 30 minutes
  expires_at: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + 1800,
});
```

```
📋 Stripe Security Checklist:

□ HTTPS only — never HTTP
□ Stripe.js loaded from stripe.com (CDN)
□ Secret key NEVER in client-side code
□ Webhook signature verified
□ Amount calculated server-side (never trust client)
□ Currency consistent (USD cents)
□ Metadata includes orderId for tracking
□ Success/Cancel URLs validated (no open redirect)
□ Session expiry set (30 min max)
□ Idempotent order processing
□ Statement descriptor set for recognizable charges
□ Test mode vs Live mode keys separated
□ Stripe Dashboard fraud rules configured
```

#### B. PCI Compliance — SAQ-A
```
📊 PCI DSS Compliance Level (SAQ-A):

✅ ئەم یاسایانە دەبێت بەجێبهێنرێن:

1. Card data هەرگیز لە server ـدا خەزن ناکرێت
   - Stripe.js handles card input client-side
   - Server تەنها Stripe tokens وەربگرێت
   
2. Card input لە Stripe Elements ـە (iframe)
   - هەرگیز <input> ـی خۆت بۆ card number مەنووسە!
   
3. HTTPS/TLS بۆ هەموو transactions
   - Vercel بە default HTTPS ـە ✅
   
4. No logging of card data
   - هەرگیز card numbers log مەکە — Stripe handles everything
   
5. Access control
   - Stripe Dashboard access limited to authorized personnel
   - API keys rotated periodically
```

#### C. Refund & Dispute Handling
```typescript
// ✅ Refund processing
export async function processRefund(orderId: string, reason: string) {
  const supabase = createAdminClient();
  
  // Get order with Stripe session
  const { data: order } = await supabase
    .from('orders')
    .select('*')
    .eq('id', orderId)
    .single();
  
  if (!order?.stripe_session_id) throw new Error('No payment found');
  
  // Get payment intent from session
  const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.retrieve(order.stripe_session_id);
  const paymentIntentId = session.payment_intent as string;
  
  // Process refund
  const refund = await stripe.refunds.create({
    payment_intent: paymentIntentId,
    reason: 'requested_by_customer',
    metadata: { orderId, reason },
  });
  
  // Update order status
  await supabase.from('orders')
    .update({ status: 'refunded', refund_id: refund.id })
    .eq('id', orderId);
  
  // Notify customer
  await sendRefundEmail(order);
  
  return refund;
}
```

### 📝 ٥٠. پشکنینی Form Validation & UX — ئاستی پڕۆفیشناڵ

#### A. Client-Side Validation — Instant Feedback
```typescript
// ✅ Form validation component pattern
'use client';
import { useState, useTransition } from 'react';

type FormErrors = Record<string, string>;

function CheckoutForm() {
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState<FormErrors>({});
  const [isPending, startTransition] = useTransition();
  
  const validateField = (name: string, value: string): string | null => {
    switch (name) {
      case 'name':
        if (!value.trim()) return 'ناوەکەت تکایە';
        if (value.length < 2) return 'ناو دەبێت لانیکەم ٢ پیت بێت';
        return null;
      
      case 'phone':
        if (!value.trim()) return 'ژمارەی مۆبایل تکایە';
        if (!/^(\+964|07)\d{9,10}$/.test(value)) return 'ژمارەی مۆبایل نادروستە';
        return null;
      
      case 'city':
        if (!value.trim()) return 'شارەکە تکایە هەڵبژێرە';
        return null;
      
      case 'address':
        if (!value.trim()) return 'ناونیشان تکایە';
        if (value.length < 5) return 'ناونیشان دەبێت لانیکەم ٥ پیت بێت';
        return null;
      
      default:
        return null;
    }
  };
  
  const handleBlur = (e: React.FocusEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    const { name, value } = e.target;
    const error = validateField(name, value);
    setErrors(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [name]: error ?? '', // Clear error if valid
    }));
  };
  
  return (
    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
      <FormField
        name="name"
        label="ناو"
        error={errors.name}
        onBlur={handleBlur}
        required
      />
      <FormField
        name="phone"
        label="ژمارەی مۆبایل"
        error={errors.phone}
        onBlur={handleBlur}
        type="tel"
        dir="ltr" // ✅ ژمارەکان هەمیشە LTR ـن
        inputMode="tel"
        placeholder="+964 750 XXX XXXX"
        required
      />
      {/* ... */}
      <button type="submit" disabled={isPending}>
        {isPending ? 'چاوەڕوان بە...' : 'داواکاری بکە'}
      </button>
    </form>
  );
}

// ✅ Reusable FormField component
function FormField({ name, label, error, ...props }: FormFieldProps) {
  return (
    <div className="mb-4">
      <label htmlFor={name} className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">
        {label} {props.required && <span className="text-red-500">*</span>}
      </label>
      <input
        id={name}
        name={name}
        aria-invalid={!!error}
        aria-describedby={error ? `${name}-error` : undefined}
        className={`w-full border rounded-lg px-4 py-2 ${
          error ? 'border-red-500 ring-red-500/20 ring-2' : 'border-gray-300'
        }`}
        {...props}
      />
      {error && (
        <p id={`${name}-error`} className="text-red-500 text-sm mt-1" role="alert">
          {error}
        </p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```
- ئایا inline validation هەیە (onBlur)؟
- ئایا error messages بە کوردی ـن؟
- ئایا `aria-invalid` و `aria-describedby` بەکارهاتووە بۆ a11y؟
- ئایا phone inputs `dir="ltr"` و `inputMode="tel"` ـیان هەیە؟
- ئایا submit button disabled ـە کاتێک submitting ـە؟
- ئایا required fields `*` نیشان دادرێت؟

#### B. Server-Side Validation — NexPOS Pattern
```typescript
// ✅ isValidShippingAddress — NexPOS checkout validation
function isValidShippingAddress(address: any): { valid: boolean; error?: string } {
  if (!address || typeof address !== 'object') {
    return { valid: false, error: 'ناونیشانی گەیاندن پێویستە' };
  }
  
  const { name, phone, city, address: addr } = address;
  
  if (!name || typeof name !== 'string' || name.trim().length < 2 || name.length > 100) {
    return { valid: false, error: 'ناوەکە نادروستە' };
  }
  
  if (!phone || typeof phone !== 'string' || !/^(\+964|07)\d{9,10}$/.test(phone)) {
    return { valid: false, error: 'ژمارەی مۆبایل نادروستە' };
  }
  
  if (!city || typeof city !== 'string' || city.trim().length < 2 || city.length > 50) {
    return { valid: false, error: 'شارەکە نادروستە' };
  }
  
  if (!addr || typeof addr !== 'string' || addr.trim().length < 5 || addr.length > 200) {
    return { valid: false, error: 'ناونیشانەکە نادروستە' };
  }
  
  return { valid: true };
}
```
- ئایا server-side validation **هەمیشە** هەیە (client validation تەنها بۆ UX ـە)؟
- ئایا type checking (typeof === 'string') هەیە؟
- ئایا length limits enforced ـن؟
- ئایا regex validation بۆ phone/email هەیە؟

### 🔔 ٥١. پشکنینی Notification System — Multi-Channel

#### A. Email Notifications — Resend
```typescript
// ✅ Email system (from NexPOS email.ts)
import { Resend } from 'resend';

const resend = process.env.RESEND_API_KEY 
  ? new Resend(process.env.RESEND_API_KEY)
  : null;

// ✅ Graceful degradation — ئەگەر API key نەبوو، log بکە
async function sendEmail(options: EmailOptions): Promise<boolean> {
  if (!resend) {
    console.warn('📧 RESEND_API_KEY not set — email skipped:', options.subject);
    return false;
  }
  
  try {
    await resend.emails.send({
      from: 'NexPOS <noreply@nexpos.app>',
      to: options.to,
      subject: options.subject,
      html: options.html,
    });
    return true;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Email send failed:', error);
    return false;
  }
}

// ✅ Order Confirmation Template
function orderConfirmationEmail(order: Order): string {
  return layout(`
    <h1 style="color: #10B981; text-align: center;">✅ داواکاریەکەت وەرگیرا!</h1>
    <p>داواکاری ژمارە: <strong>${order.id.slice(0, 8)}</strong></p>
    
    <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">
      <thead>
        <tr style="background: #F3F4F6;">
          <th style="padding: 8px; text-align: right;">بەرهەم</th>
          <th style="padding: 8px;">بڕ</th>
          <th style="padding: 8px;">نرخ</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        ${order.items.map(item => `
          <tr>
            <td style="padding: 8px;">${item.name}</td>
            <td style="padding: 8px; text-align: center;">${item.quantity}</td>
            <td style="padding: 8px;">${formatPrice(item.price)}</td>
          </tr>
        `).join('')}
      </tbody>
    </table>
    
    <p style="font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;">
      کۆی گشتی: ${formatPrice(order.total)}
    </p>
  `);
}
```

#### B. In-App Notifications — Database Pattern
```typescript
// ✅ Database-based notification system (NexPOS schema)
/*
CREATE TABLE notifications (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  body TEXT,
  type TEXT DEFAULT 'info', -- info, success, warning, error
  read BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  link TEXT, -- deep link to relevant page
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);
*/

// ✅ Create notification helper
async function createNotification(supabase, {
  userId, title, body, type = 'info', link
}: NotificationInput) {
  return supabase.from('notifications').insert({
    user_id: userId,
    title,
    body,
    type,
    link,
  });
}

// ✅ Multi-channel notification after order
async function notifyOrderCompleted(order: Order) {
  await Promise.allSettled([
    // Channel 1: Email
    sendOrderConfirmation(order),
    
    // Channel 2: In-app notification
    createNotification(supabase, {
      userId: order.user_id,
      title: 'داواکاریەکەت وەرگیرا ✅',
      body: `داواکاری #${order.id.slice(0, 8)} — ${formatPrice(order.total)}`,
      type: 'success',
      link: `/orders/${order.id}`,
    }),
    
    // Channel 3: Admin notification
    createNotification(supabase, {
      userId: 'admin-user-id',
      title: '🛒 داواکاریی نوێ!',
      body: `${order.customer_name} — ${formatPrice(order.total)}`,
      type: 'info',
      link: `/admin/orders/${order.id}`,
    }),
  ]);
}
```

#### C. Push Notifications — Integration
```
📋 Notification Channels:

| Channel | Use Case | Priority |
|---------|----------|----------|
| Email (Resend) | Order confirmation, shipping, password reset | 🔴 Must |
| In-App (Database) | All events — bell icon in header | 🔴 Must |
| Push (SW) | Order status changes, promotions | 🟡 Nice |
| SMS (API) | Order confirmation for COD, urgent alerts | 🟡 Nice |
| WhatsApp | Customer support, delivery tracking | 🟢 Future |
```
- ئایا email notifications بۆ order lifecycle هەن (confirmed, shipped, delivered)؟
- ئایا in-app notification system هەیە (database-based)؟
- ئایا notification unread count نیشان دادرێت (bell icon badge)؟
- ئایا push notifications بەکارهاتووە بۆ real-time alerts؟
- ئایا Promise.allSettled بۆ multi-channel ـە (یەک channel fail نابێت هەمووی بگرێت)؟

### ⚡ ٥٢. پشکنینی Performance Profiling — ئاستی Expert

#### A. React Performance — React DevTools
```typescript
// ✅ React Profiler — measure component render times
import { Profiler } from 'react';

function onRender(
  id: string,
  phase: 'mount' | 'update',
  actualDuration: number,
  baseDuration: number,
) {
  if (actualDuration > 16) { // > 1 frame (16ms)
    console.warn(`🐌 Slow render: ${id} took ${actualDuration.toFixed(1)}ms (${phase})`);
  }
}

// Wrap suspicious components
<Profiler id="ProductGrid" onRender={onRender}>
  <ProductGrid products={products} />
</Profiler>
```

```
📊 React Performance Red Flags:

❌ re-rendering بەبێ پێویست:
   - New object/array created on every render: { items: [...] }
   - Anonymous functions in JSX: onClick={() => handleClick(id)}
   - Context value changes on every render
   - Missing key prop in lists

✅ چارەسەر:
   - React Compiler (ئۆتۆماتیکی بۆ NexPOS ✅)
   - useMemo بۆ expensive calculations
   - useCallback بۆ stable function references
   - React.memo بۆ pure components
   - Context splitting (جیاکردنەوەی context بۆ frequently-changing values)
```

```typescript
// ✅ next.config.ts — bundle analyzer
// npm i @next/bundle-analyzer

```
📊 Bundle Size Budget:

| Chunk | Max Size (gzip) | Current | Status |
|-------|----------------|---------|--------|
| First Load JS | 100kB | ? | □ Check |
| layout.js | 50kB | ? | □ Check |
| page.js (homepage) | 30kB | ? | □ Check |
| Largest chunk | 200kB | ? | □ Check |
| Total client JS | 500kB | ? | □ Check |
| CSS | 50kB | ? | □ Check |

📋 Bundle Reduction Strategies:
□ Replace moment.js → date-fns or dayjs (80% smaller)
□ Replace lodash → lodash-es (tree-shakeable)
□ Dynamic import heavy components (charts, editors)
□ Verify tree-shaking works (ESM imports only)
□ Remove unused exports
□ Check for duplicate packages (npm ls --all)
```

#### D. Memory Profiling
```
📋 Memory Leak Detection Workflow:

1. Chrome DevTools → Memory tab
2. Record Heap Snapshots (3 snapshots rule):
   - Snapshot 1: Page load
   - Perform actions (navigate, open modals, add to cart)
   - Snapshot 2: After actions
   - Navigate away and back
   - Snapshot 3: After navigation
   
3. Compare Snapshot 1 vs 3:
   - ئەگەر Snapshot 3 > Snapshot 1 بە بڕێکی بەرچاو → memory leak!
   
4. Common causes:
   - Event listeners not cleaned up in useEffect
   - setInterval not cleared
   - WebSocket subscriptions not unsubscribed
   - Zustand store growing without cleanup
   - Large arrays in state without pagination
```

## 📚 بەشی سەرچاوەکان — Reference Tables, Grep Patterns & Decision Trees

### 🛡️ OWASP Top 10 — Mapping بۆ NexPOS

#### OWASP A01:2021 — Broken Access Control
```
📋 Broken Access Control — لە NexPOS دا:

🔍 شوێنەکانی مەترسی:
├── src/app/api/admin/ — هەموو admin endpoints
├── src/app/api/orders/ — order access بەبێ user check
├── src/app/(store)/orders/ — IDOR لە order pages
├── src/app/(store)/settings/ — accessing other users' settings
└── supabase/schema.sql — RLS policies

📝 چەکلیست:
□ هەموو API routes auth check ـیان هەیە
□ Admin routes is_admin() check ـیان هەیە
□ RLS enabled لەسەر هەموو tables
□ No USING (true) لە RLS policies
□ getUser() not getSession() server-side
□ File access controlled (Supabase Storage policies)
□ User can only access own data (user_id filter)
□ Admin escalation prevented (can't self-assign admin role)

🔍 grep patterns:
```bash
# بگەڕێ بۆ routes بەبێ auth
grep -rn "export async function" src/app/api/ | while read line; do
  file=$(echo "$line" | cut -d: -f1)
  if ! grep -q "getUser\|auth\." "$file"; then
    echo "⚠️ No auth check: $file"
  fi
done

# بگەڕێ بۆ admin routes بەبێ admin check
grep -rn "export async function" src/app/api/admin/ | while read line; do
  file=$(echo "$line" | cut -d: -f1)
  if ! grep -q "is_admin\|role.*admin" "$file"; then
    echo "🚨 No admin check: $file"
  fi
done
```

❌ ناسەلامەت:
```typescript
// API route بەبێ auth — anyone can access!
export async function GET(request: Request) {
  const { data } = await supabase.from('orders').select('*')
  return NextResponse.json(data)
}

// IDOR — user can see any order by changing ID
export async function GET(
  request: Request,
  { params }: { params: { id: string } }
) {
  const { data: order } = await supabase
    .from('orders')
    .select('*')
    .eq('id', params.id) // No user_id filter!
    .single()
  return NextResponse.json(order)
}
```

✅ سەلامەت:
```typescript
// Auth check + ownership verification
export async function GET(
  request: Request,
  { params }: { params: { id: string } }
) {
  const supabase = createServerClient(/* cookies */)
  const { data: { user }, error } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
  if (error || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
  }
  
  // RLS automatically filters by user_id
  const { data: order } = await supabase
    .from('orders')
    .select('*')
    .eq('id', params.id)
    .single()
  
  if (!order) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Not found' }, { status: 404 })
  }
  
  return NextResponse.json(order)
}
```
```

#### OWASP A02:2021 — Cryptographic Failures
```
📋 Cryptographic Failures — لە NexPOS دا:

🔍 شوێنەکانی مەترسی:
├── .env files — secret storage
├── src/lib/supabase-server.ts — service role key handling
├── src/lib/safe-compare.ts — timing-safe comparison
├── cookies — session token security
└── HTTPS enforcement — HSTS header

📝 چەکلیست:
□ هەموو secrets لە .env فایلدان (نەک hardcoded)
□ .env لە .gitignore ـدایە
□ HTTPS-only (HSTS header)
□ Cookie attributes: httpOnly, secure, sameSite
□ No MD5 or SHA1 for security purposes
□ Timing-safe comparison for tokens
□ No PII in logs
□ Stripe webhook signature verified
□ JWT tokens short-lived
□ Service role key never in NEXT_PUBLIC_

🔍 grep patterns:
```bash
# بگەڕێ بۆ exposed secrets
grep -rn "sk_live\|sk_test" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v "process.env"
grep -rn "service_role" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v "process.env"
grep -rn "password.*=.*['\"]" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v "process.env\|formData\|schema"

# بگەڕێ بۆ weak hashing
grep -rn "md5\|sha1\|createHash" src/ --include="*.ts"

# بگەڕێ بۆ PII in logs
grep -rn "console\.\(log\|error\|warn\)" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -i "email\|phone\|password\|address\|card"
```

❌ ناسەلامەت:
```typescript
// Secret hardcoded in source!
const STRIPE_KEY = 'sk_live_xxxxxxxxxxxx'

// PII in logs
console.log('User login:', { email: user.email, password: formData.password })

// Weak comparison (timing attack possible)
if (webhookSecret === receivedSignature) { /* ... */ }

// NEXT_PUBLIC_ with sensitive key
// .env
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=xxxx  // 🚨 EXPOSED TO CLIENT!
```

✅ سەلامەت:
```typescript
// Secrets from environment
const stripeKey = process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY!

// No PII in logs
console.log('User login:', { userId: user.id, success: true })

// Timing-safe comparison
import { timingSafeEqual } from 'crypto'
import { safeCompare } from '@/lib/safe-compare'
if (safeCompare(webhookSecret, receivedSignature)) { /* ... */ }

// Server-only secrets
// .env
SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=xxxx  // ✅ No NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix
```
```

#### OWASP A03:2021 — Injection
```
📋 Injection — لە NexPOS دا:

🔍 شوێنەکانی مەترسی:
├── Database queries — SQL injection
├── Component rendering — XSS
├── URL handling — open redirect
├── File paths — path traversal
└── Email templates — header injection

📝 چەکلیست:
□ Supabase query builder بەکارهاتووە (parameterized)
□ هیچ raw SQL بەبێ parameterization نییە
□ dangerouslySetInnerHTML تەنها بە DOMPurify
□ URL redirects validated (internal only)
□ File upload paths sanitized
□ Email input sanitized (no CRLF injection)
□ Search input sanitized
□ Zod validation بۆ هەموو API inputs

🔍 grep patterns:
```bash
# SQL injection
grep -rn "\.rpc(\|\.raw(\|sql\`\|templateLiteral.*select\|templateLiteral.*insert" src/ --include="*.ts"
grep -rn "\${.*}" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -i "from\|where\|select\|insert\|delete\|update"

# XSS
grep -rn "dangerouslySetInnerHTML" src/ --include="*.tsx"
grep -rn "innerHTML\|outerHTML\|document\.write" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"
grep -rn "eval(\|new Function(" src/ --include="*.ts"

# Open redirect
grep -rn "redirect(\|router\.push(\|window\.location" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"

# Path traversal
grep -rn "\.\.\/" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v "import\|require\|node_modules"
```

❌ ناسەلامەت:
```typescript
// SQL injection via string interpolation
const { data } = await supabase
  .from('products')
  .select('*')
  .filter('name', 'ilike', `%${userInput}%`)  // ⚠️ OK with Supabase

// But NOT with raw SQL:
const result = await supabase.rpc('search_products', { 
  query: `%' OR 1=1 --` // 🚨 If RPC uses unparameterized SQL!
})

// XSS via unsanitized HTML
<div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: product.description }} />

// Open redirect
const returnUrl = searchParams.get('redirect')
redirect(returnUrl!) // 🚨 Could redirect to evil.com!
```

✅ سەلامەت:
```typescript
// Parameterized queries (Supabase handles this)
const { data } = await supabase
  .from('products')
  .select('*')
  .ilike('name', `%${userInput}%`)  // ✅ Supabase parameterizes

// Safe RPC with parameterized function
CREATE FUNCTION search_products(query TEXT)
RETURNS SETOF products AS $$
  SELECT * FROM products WHERE name ILIKE '%' || query || '%';
$$ LANGUAGE sql SECURITY DEFINER;

// Sanitized HTML
import DOMPurify from 'isomorphic-dompurify'
<div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: DOMPurify.sanitize(product.description) }} />

// Validated redirect
const returnUrl = searchParams.get('redirect') || '/'
const safeUrl = returnUrl.startsWith('/') && !returnUrl.startsWith('//') 
  ? returnUrl 
  : '/'
redirect(safeUrl) // ✅ Internal only
```
```

#### OWASP A04:2021 — Insecure Design
```
📋 Insecure Design — لە NexPOS دا:

🔍 سیناریۆکانی مەترسی:
├── Cart manipulation (client-side prices)
├── Race conditions (stock management)
├── Coupon abuse (reuse, brute force)
├── Account enumeration (login/register/reset)
└── Business logic bypass (skip checkout steps)

📝 طرحی سەلامەت:

1. Price Verification:
   Client cart → API receives product IDs + quantities only
   → Server queries DB for real prices
   → Server calculates total
   → Server creates Stripe session

2. Stock Management:
   Check stock → Decrement stock → Create order
   All in ONE database transaction (RPC function)
   SELECT FOR UPDATE to prevent race conditions

3. Coupon System:
   Validate on server (not client)
   Check: exists, not expired, min_order met, usage_limit not exceeded
   Apply discount server-side
   Record usage

4. Account Enumeration Prevention:
   Register: "Check your email" (regardless of existing)
   Login: "Invalid credentials" (generic)
   Reset: "If email exists, link sent" (always same response)
```

📝 Webhook Verification Pattern:
```typescript
// ✅ Stripe webhook — always verify signature
const sig = request.headers.get('stripe-signature')!
const body = await request.text() // Raw body, not JSON

let event: Stripe.Event
try {
  event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(
    body,
    sig,
    process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!
  )
} catch (err) {
  console.error('Webhook signature verification failed:', err)
  return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid signature' }, { status: 400 })
}
// Only process verified events
```

#### OWASP A10:2021 — Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
```
📋 SSRF — لە NexPOS دا:

🔍 شوێنەکانی مەترسی:
├── Image URL handling (user-provided image URLs)
├── Webhook callbacks
├── API proxy routes
├── URL preview/metadata fetching

📝 چەکلیست:
□ User-provided URLs validated (no internal IPs)
□ URL schemes restricted (https:// only)
□ No fetching to localhost/127.0.0.1/10.*/172.*/192.168.*
□ DNS rebinding prevention
□ Response from external URLs not blindly returned

```typescript
// ❌ SSRF vulnerable — user controls the URL
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const { url } = await request.json()
  const response = await fetch(url)  // 🚨 Could be internal!
  return NextResponse.json(await response.json())
}

// ✅ Safe — validate URL before fetching
const ALLOWED_DOMAINS = ['supabase.co', 'stripe.com']

function isAllowedUrl(url: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsed = new URL(url)
    if (parsed.protocol !== 'https:') return false
    if (parsed.hostname === 'localhost') return false
    if (/^(10\.|172\.(1[6-9]|2\d|3[01])\.|192\.168\.)/.test(parsed.hostname)) return false
    if (ALLOWED_DOMAINS.length > 0) {
      return ALLOWED_DOMAINS.some(d => parsed.hostname.endsWith(d))
    }
    return true
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}
```
```

---

### 🔍 A. Master Grep Patterns — بۆ دۆزینەوەی کێشەکان

#### A1. Security Grep Patterns
```bash
# ═══════ Authentication & Authorization ═══════
# بگەڕێ بۆ missing auth checks
grep -rn "export async function POST\|export async function PUT\|export async function DELETE" src/app/api/ --include="*.ts" | head -20
grep -rn "getUser\|getSession\|auth\." src/app/api/ --include="*.ts" | wc -l  # count auth checks

# بگەڕێ بۆ admin routes بەبێ role check
grep -rn "admin" src/app/api/ -l --include="*.ts"
grep -rn "is_admin\|role.*admin\|profile.*role" src/app/api/admin/ --include="*.ts"

# بگەڕێ بۆ exposed secrets
grep -rn "sk_live\|sk_test\|service_role\|secret_key\|password" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "process.env\|\.env\|NEXT_PUBLIC"
grep -rn "Bearer \|token.*=.*['\"]" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v "process.env"

# بگەڕێ بۆ SQL injection risks
grep -rn "\.rpc(\|\.raw(\|sql\`\|query(" src/ --include="*.ts"
grep -rn "\${.*}" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -i "select\|insert\|update\|delete\|from\|where"

# بگەڕێ بۆ XSS vectors
grep -rn "dangerouslySetInnerHTML\|__html" src/ --include="*.tsx"
grep -rn "innerHTML\|outerHTML\|document\.write" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"
grep -rn "eval(\|new Function(\|setTimeout.*string" src/ --include="*.ts"

# بگەڕێ بۆ CSRF/SSRF/Open Redirect
grep -rn "redirect(\|window\.location\|location\.href" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "'/\|\"/"
grep -rn "fetch(\|axios\." src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v "process.env\|NEXT_PUBLIC"

# Rate limiting check
grep -rn "rateLimiter\|rateLimit\|rate.limit\|checkRate" src/ --include="*.ts"

# بگەڕێ بۆ prototype pollution
grep -rn "Object\.assign(\|\.\.\.req\.body\|\.\.\.body\|deepMerge\|_.merge" src/ --include="*.ts"

# بگەڕێ بۆ timing attacks
grep -rn "=== .*secret\|=== .*token\|=== .*key\|=== .*password" src/ --include="*.ts" | grep -v "timingSafeEqual"
```

#### A2. Performance Grep Patterns
```bash
# ═══════ Bundle & Performance ═══════
# بگەڕێ بۆ heavy imports
grep -rn "import .* from 'lodash'" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"    # use lodash-es
grep -rn "import .* from 'moment'" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"    # use day.js
grep -rn "import .* from 'axios'" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"     # use fetch

# بگەڕێ بۆ missing dynamic imports
grep -rn "import.*Chart\|import.*Editor\|import.*Map\|import.*Calendar" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "dynamic\|lazy"

# بگەڕێ بۆ unnecessary 'use client'
grep -rn "'use client'" src/ --include="*.tsx" | wc -l
# Compare with components that actually use hooks:
grep -rn "useState\|useEffect\|useRef\|onClick" src/ --include="*.tsx" | wc -l

# بگەڕێ بۆ N+1 queries
grep -rn "\.from(" src/app/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" | grep "for\|\.map\|\.forEach"

# بگەڕێ بۆ missing image optimization
grep -rn "<img " src/ --include="*.tsx"     # should use next/image
grep -rn "Image.*src=" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "width\|height\|fill"  # missing dimensions

# بگەڕێ بۆ console.log (development artifacts)
grep -rn "console\.log\|console\.debug" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "error\|warn\|info"

# بگەڕێ بۆ sync operations
grep -rn "fs\.readFileSync\|fs\.writeFileSync\|execSync" src/ --include="*.ts"
```

#### A3. Accessibility Grep Patterns
```bash
# ═══════ Accessibility ═══════
# بگەڕێ بۆ missing alt text
grep -rn "<img\|<Image" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "alt="
grep -rn "alt=\"\"" src/ --include="*.tsx"  # empty alt (decorative images OK, content images NOT)

# بگەڕێ بۆ missing form labels
grep -rn "<input\|<select\|<textarea" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "aria-label\|id="
grep -rn "<label" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "htmlFor\|for="

# بگەڕێ بۆ click handlers بەبێ keyboard
grep -rn "onClick" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep "div\|span\|p\|section" | grep -v "role=\|tabIndex\|onKeyDown"

# بگەڕێ بۆ color contrast issues (hardcoded light colors)
grep -rn "text-gray-300\|text-gray-200\|text-gray-100" src/ --include="*.tsx"

# بگەڕێ بۆ missing focus styles
grep -rn "outline-none\|outline-0" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "focus-visible\|focus:"

# بگەڕێ بۆ aria attributes
grep -rn "aria-" src/ --include="*.tsx" | wc -l  # should be > 0

# بگەڕێ بۆ heading hierarchy
grep -rn "<h1\|<h2\|<h3\|<h4" src/ --include="*.tsx" | sort
```

#### A4. RTL & i18n Grep Patterns
```bash
# ═══════ RTL & Internationalization ═══════
# بگەڕێ بۆ non-logical CSS properties (RTL-breaking)
grep -rn "ml-\|mr-\|pl-\|pr-" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "ms-\|me-\|ps-\|pe-\|mx-\|my-\|px-\|py-\|m-\|p-"
grep -rn "text-left\|text-right" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "text-start\|text-end"
grep -rn "left-\|right-" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "start-\|end-\|inset-"
grep -rn "rounded-l\|rounded-r" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "rounded-s\|rounded-e"
grep -rn "border-l-\|border-r-" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "border-s-\|border-e-"
grep -rn "float-left\|float-right" src/ --include="*.tsx"
grep -rn "translate-x-\|translateX" src/ --include="*.tsx"  # may need RTL flip

# بگەڕێ بۆ hardcoded strings (should be in translations)
grep -rn "'Add to\|'Remove\|'Cart\|'Login\|'Home\|'Products\|'Search\|'Submit" src/components/ --include="*.tsx"
grep -rn "\"Add to\|\"Remove\|\"Cart\|\"Login\|\"Home\|\"Products\|\"Search\|\"Submit" src/components/ --include="*.tsx"
# Kurdish hardcoded
grep -rn "'سەبەتە\|'بەرهەم\|'نرخ\|'گەڕان\|'داخڵبوون" src/components/ --include="*.tsx"

# بگەڕێ بۆ missing dir="ltr" لەسەر number/phone inputs
grep -rn "type=\"tel\"\|type=\"number\"\|inputMode=\"numeric\"" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "dir="

# بگەڕێ بۆ lang/dir attributes
grep -rn "lang=\|dir=" src/app/layout.tsx
```

#### A5. Code Quality Grep Patterns
```bash
# ═══════ Code Quality ═══════
# بگەڕێ بۆ any type
grep -rn ": any\|as any\|<any>" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" | wc -l

# بگەڕێ بۆ TODO/FIXME/HACK
grep -rn "TODO\|FIXME\|HACK\|XXX\|TEMP\|WORKAROUND" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"

# بگەڕێ بۆ @ts-ignore
grep -rn "@ts-ignore\|@ts-nocheck\|@ts-expect-error" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"

# بگەڕێ بۆ empty catch blocks
grep -rn "catch.*{}" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"
grep -rn "catch.*{\s*}" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx"

# بگەڕێ بۆ large files
wc -l src/**/*.tsx src/**/*.ts 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -20

# بگەڕێ بۆ unused imports (TypeScript compiler catches this)
npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep "unused\|declared but"

# بگەڕێ بۆ deeply nested code
grep -rn "if.*{" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" | awk -F'{' '{print NF-1, $0}' | sort -rn | head -10

# بگەڕێ بۆ magic numbers
grep -rn "[^0-9]\(1000\|3600\|86400\|60000\|30000\|5000\)" src/ --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "const\|//\|Max-Age\|maxAge\|RATE"
```

#### A6. SEO & Meta Grep Patterns
```bash
# ═══════ SEO ═══════
# بگەڕێ بۆ pages بەبێ metadata
grep -rn "export.*metadata\|generateMetadata" src/app/ --include="*.tsx" -l  # pages with metadata
find src/app -name "page.tsx" | while read f; do
  if ! grep -q "metadata\|generateMetadata" "$f"; then
    echo "⚠️ Missing metadata: $f"
  fi
done

# بگەڕێ بۆ sitemap/robots
find src/app -name "sitemap.ts" -o -name "robots.ts"

# بگەڕێ بۆ semantic HTML
grep -rn "<div.*onClick\|<span.*onClick" src/ --include="*.tsx" | grep -v "role=\|button\|link"
grep -rn "<main\|<nav\|<header\|<footer\|<article\|<section\|<aside" src/ --include="*.tsx" | wc -l
```

### 📊 B. Decision Trees — بڕیارنامەکان

#### B1. Component Type Decision Tree
```
📊 بڕیاربدە: چ جۆرە component ـێک دروست بکەم؟

                     ئایا data لە database پێویستە؟
                              │
                    ┌─────────┴─────────┐
                    │                   │
                  بەڵێ              نەخێر
                    │                   │
              ئایا user              ئایا state
              interaction هەیە?      management هەیە?
                    │                   │
              ┌─────┴─────┐       ┌─────┴─────┐
              │           │       │           │
            بەڵێ       نەخێر   بەڵێ       نەخێر
              │           │       │           │
           Server       Server  Client      Server
           Component    Component Component Component
           +              ✅      ✅          ✅
           Client Island          'use client' (static UI)
           (composition)          
              
    // نموونە:
    // Product Page (data + cart button):
    //   Server Component fetches products
    //   Client Component <AddToCartButton> بۆ interaction
    
    // Admin Dashboard (data only):
    //   Server Component ← تەنها data display
    
    // Theme Toggle (state only):
    //   Client Component ← useState بۆ theme
    
    // Footer (static):
    //   Server Component ← هیچ state/data نییە
```

#### B2. State Management Decision Tree
```
📊 بڕیاربدە: state لە کوێ بمێنێت؟

                     ئایا server data ـە (database)؟
                              │
                    ┌─────────┴─────────┐
                    │                   │
                  بەڵێ              نەخێر (UI state)
                    │                   │
              ئایا real-time         ئایا persist 
              پێویستە?              دەکرێت (page reload)?
                    │                   │
              ┌─────┴─────┐       ┌─────┴─────┐
              │           │       │           │
            بەڵێ       نەخێر   بەڵێ       نەخێر
              │           │       │           │
           Supabase    Server   Zustand +   React
           Realtime    Component persist    useState/
           subscribe   (fetch     ↓        useReducer
              ↓        on render) localStorage
           useEffect      ↓                  ↓
           channel    RSC query          Component
                                         local state

    نموونەکان:
    ├── products list → Server Component query
    ├── order status → Supabase Realtime
    ├── shopping cart → Zustand + persist (localStorage)
    ├── theme/locale → React Context + cookie
    ├── form state → React useState
    ├── search results → URL searchParams
    └── modal open/close → React useState
```

#### B3. Caching Decision Tree
```
📊 بڕیاربدە: چ cache strategy ـێک بەکاربهێنم؟

                     ئەم content ـە...
                              │
              ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
              │               │               │
          Static          Mostly-static    User-specific
          content         (changes rarely)  (personalized)
              │               │               │
         ISR: ∞          ISR + revalidate  force-dynamic
         (build once)    (60-3600 seconds) (no caching)
              │               │               │
         نموونە:          نموونە:           نموونە:
         About page      Products list    Cart page
         Privacy page    Homepage         Settings page
         Terms page      Category pages   Order history
                         Brand pages       Admin pages
```

#### B4. Error Handling Decision Tree
```
📊 بڕیاربدە: چۆن هەڵە handle بکەم؟

                     هەڵەکە لە کوێیە؟
                              │
              ┌───────────────┼───────────────┐
              │               │               │
          API Route       Component        Network
          (server)        (client)         (fetch)
              │               │               │
         Return JSON     error.tsx        try/catch
         { error: {      boundary         + retry
           code,         catches it       + fallback
           message,          │                │
           status        User sees         User sees
         }}              friendly          toast
              │          error page        message
              │              │                │
         Log details     Log to           Offline
         (no PII)        Sentry           detection
```
