## 📋 Cheat Sheets — لیستەکانی خێرا

### 🔒 Cheat Sheet #1: Security Audit — ٥٠ پشکنینی سەرەکی

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════
🔒 ئەمنیەت — ٥٠ پشکنینی سەرەکی
═══════════════════════════════════════════════

Auth & Sessions:
□ 1.  هەموو API routes auth check ـیان هەیە
□ 2.  Admin routes double-gated (middleware + handler)
□ 3.  getUser() بەکارهاتووە نەک getSession() (server-side)
□ 4.  Password reset tokens expire (1hr max)
□ 5.  Password reset tokens one-time use
□ 6.  Failed login rate limiting
□ 7.  Email enumeration prevention
□ 8.  Session expires after inactivity
□ 9.  Logout clears all tokens
□ 10. OAuth callback URL validated

Input Validation:
□ 11. هەموو API inputs Zod validated
□ 12. File upload: type check (magic bytes, not just extension)
□ 13. File upload: size limit (5MB max)
□ 14. File upload: filename sanitization
□ 15. SQL parameters parameterized (not string concatenation)
□ 16. HTML output escaped (no raw innerHTML)
□ 17. URL redirects validated (no open redirect)
□ 18. JSON parsing wrapped in try/catch
□ 19. Integer overflow prevented (price * quantity)
□ 20. Path traversal prevented (../../ in file paths)

Headers & Transport:
□ 21. HTTPS only (HSTS header)
□ 22. CSP header configured
□ 23. X-Frame-Options: DENY
□ 24. X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
□ 25. Referrer-Policy set
□ 26. Permissions-Policy set
□ 27. X-Powered-By removed
□ 28. CORS properly configured (not *)
□ 29. SameSite cookie attribute set
□ 30. HttpOnly on auth cookies

Data Protection:
□ 31. PII not logged (email, phone, address)
□ 32. Secrets not in client bundle (NEXT_PUBLIC_ check)
□ 33. .env in .gitignore
□ 34. API error messages don't leak internals
□ 35. Database credentials not exposed
□ 36. Supabase RLS enabled on all tables
□ 37. Service role only used when necessary
□ 38. Soft delete (trash) not hard delete
□ 39. Backup/restore requires admin role
□ 40. User data export capability (GDPR)

Payment Security:
□ 41. Stripe webhook signature verified
□ 42. Prices validated server-side (not from client)
□ 43. Idempotent payment processing
□ 44. Refund authorization (admin only)
□ 45. PCI compliance (no card data stored)

Infrastructure:
□ 46. npm audit clean (no high/critical)
□ 47. Dependencies up to date
□ 48. No known CVEs in packages
□ 49. Rate limiting on all write endpoints
□ 50. Error boundaries don't expose stack traces
```

### ⚡ Cheat Sheet #2: Performance Audit — ٣٠ پشکنین

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════
⚡ ئەدا — ٣٠ پشکنینی سەرەکی
═══════════════════════════════════════════════

Core Web Vitals:
□ 1.  LCP < 2.5s (hero image, main content)
□ 2.  FID/INP < 200ms (interaction delay)
□ 3.  CLS < 0.1 (layout stability)
□ 4.  FCP < 1.8s (first paint)
□ 5.  TTFB < 800ms (server response)

Images:
□ 6.  next/image بەکارهاتووە (نەک <img>)
□ 7.  width/height یان fill set ـە
□ 8.  sizes attribute بۆ responsive
□ 9.  priority بۆ above-the-fold images
□ 10. WebP/AVIF format

JavaScript:
□ 11. Server Components بۆ data fetching
□ 12. Client Components تەنها بۆ interactivity
□ 13. Dynamic imports بۆ heavy components
□ 14. No unnecessary re-renders
□ 15. React Compiler enabled
□ 16. Bundle size < 100KB first load

Data:
□ 17. Parallel data fetching (Promise.all)
□ 18. No N+1 queries
□ 19. Proper ISR/revalidation times
□ 20. Database queries use select() نەک select('*')
□ 21. Pagination بۆ large lists

CSS:
□ 22. Tailwind CSS purged (production)
□ 23. No unused CSS
□ 24. CSS containment بەکارهاتووە
□ 25. Animations GPU-accelerated

Network:
□ 26. Font preloading
□ 27. DNS prefetch بۆ external domains
□ 28. Service worker بۆ offline (PWA)
□ 29. Compression enabled (gzip/brotli)
□ 30. CDN بۆ static assets
```

### ♿ Cheat Sheet #3: Accessibility — ٣٠ پشکنین

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════
♿ دەسترەسپێداری — ٣٠ پشکنینی WCAG 2.2
═══════════════════════════════════════════════

Perceivable:
□ 1.  هەموو images alt text ـیان هەیە
□ 2.  Decorative images alt="" یان aria-hidden
□ 3.  Color contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 (text)
□ 4.  Color contrast ratio ≥ 3:1 (large text/UI)
□ 5.  Information نەک تەنها بە ڕەنگ communicate بکرێت
□ 6.  Video captions/subtitles (ئەگەر هەبن)
□ 7.  Audio transcripts (ئەگەر هەبن)

Operable:
□ 8.  هەموو interactive elements keyboard-accessible
□ 9.  Focus indicators visible
□ 10. No keyboard trap
□ 11. Skip to main content link
□ 12. Touch targets ≥ 44x44px
□ 13. No auto-playing media
□ 14. Animations respect prefers-reduced-motion
□ 15. Page titles unique and descriptive

Understandable:
□ 16. lang attribute لەسەر <html>
□ 17. Form labels associated with inputs
□ 18. Error messages clear and specific
□ 19. Required fields marked
□ 20. Instructions بۆ complex forms
□ 21. Consistent navigation across pages

Robust:
□ 22. Valid HTML (no duplicate IDs)
□ 23. ARIA roles used correctly
□ 24. aria-label/aria-labelledby بۆ icons
□ 25. Live regions بۆ dynamic content
□ 26. Semantic HTML (nav, main, header, footer)
□ 27. Heading hierarchy (h1→h2→h3)

RTL-Specific:
□ 28. dir attribute dynamic
□ 29. Logical properties بەکارهاتووە
□ 30. Number/phone inputs dir="ltr"
```

### 🗄️ Cheat Sheet #4: Supabase Security — ٢٥ پشکنین

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════
🗄️ Supabase — ٢٥ پشکنینی ئەمنیەت
═══════════════════════════════════════════════

RLS:
□ 1.  RLS enabled لەسەر هەموو tables
□ 2.  هەموو tables policies ـیان هەیە (SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE)
□ 3.  auth.uid() بەکارهاتووە بۆ user isolation
□ 4.  is_admin() function SECURITY DEFINER ـە
□ 5.  No USING (true) لە policies (wide open)
□ 6.  Foreign key constraints enforced
□ 7.  Cascading deletes controlled

Authentication:
□ 8.  getUser() server-side (not getSession)
□ 9.  Cookie-based auth (@supabase/ssr)
□ 10. Email confirmation required
□ 11. Password minimum requirements
□ 12. Phone auth rate limited (ئەگەر هەبێت)

Client:
□ 13. Browser client: anon key only
□ 14. Server client: cookie bridge pattern
□ 15. Admin client: service role, server-only
□ 16. No service role key لە NEXT_PUBLIC_
□ 17. createBrowserClient singleton pattern

Storage:
□ 18. Storage buckets have policies
□ 19. File type validation (server-side)
□ 20. File size limits set
□ 21. Public bucket بۆ product images تەنها
□ 22. Private bucket بۆ user uploads

Queries:
□ 23. select() specific columns (not *)
□ 24. .single() بۆ unique lookups
□ 25. Error handling بۆ هەموو queries
```

### 💳 Cheat Sheet #5: Stripe Integration — ٢٠ پشکنین

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════
💳 Stripe — ٢٠ پشکنینی ئەمنیەت و Integration
═══════════════════════════════════════════════

Keys:
□ 1.  STRIPE_SECRET_KEY server-only
□ 2.  NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY client-safe
□ 3.  STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET server-only
□ 4.  No test keys لە production

Checkout:
□ 5.  Prices verified server-side (DB query, not client price)
□ 6.  Stock checked before session creation
□ 7.  Coupon validated server-side
□ 8.  Success/cancel URLs validated (no open redirect)
□ 9.  Metadata includes order reference

Webhook:
□ 10. Signature verification (stripe.webhooks.constructEvent)
□ 11. Raw body used (not JSON-parsed)
□ 12. Idempotent processing (check order status first)
□ 13. Always return 200 (even on business failure)
□ 14. Async operations (don't block webhook response)

Client:
□ 15. loadStripe() singleton (not called multiple times)
□ 16. <Elements> provider wraps payment forms
□ 17. No card data touches your server (PCI SAQ-A)

Operations:
□ 18. Refunds require admin authorization
□ 19. Stripe Dashboard MFA enabled
□ 20. Webhook events logged for audit trail
```

### 📱 Cheat Sheet #6: Mobile/Responsive — ٢٥ پشکنین

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════
📱 مۆبایل — ٢٥ پشکنینی Responsive
═══════════════════════════════════════════════

Layout:
□ 1.  Mobile-first CSS (min-width media queries)
□ 2.  viewport meta tag correct
□ 3.  No horizontal overflow
□ 4.  Content readable without zoom (16px min font)
□ 5.  Grid/flex responsive breakpoints

Touch:
□ 6.  Touch targets ≥ 44x44px (WCAG 2.5.8)
□ 7.  Sufficient spacing between targets (≥ 8px)
□ 8.  No hover-only features without fallback
□ 9.  Swipe gestures have alternatives
□ 10. Double-tap zoom not broken

Forms:
□ 11. inputMode="numeric" بۆ numbers
□ 12. inputMode="email" بۆ email
□ 13. inputMode="tel" بۆ phone
□ 14. enterKeyHint="search|send|done"
□ 15. autoComplete attributes
□ 16. Labels visible (not placeholder-only)

Navigation:
□ 17. Mobile menu accessible
□ 18. Bottom navigation (ئەگەر هەبێت)
□ 19. Sticky header not too tall
□ 20. Back button works (browser history)

Performance:
□ 21. Images responsive (sizes attribute)
□ 22. Lazy loading below-fold images
□ 23. Reduced animations (prefers-reduced-motion)
□ 24. Offline support (PWA/service worker)
□ 25. Network-aware loading (connection API)
```

### 🌍 Cheat Sheet #7: i18n & Kurdish — ٢٠ پشکنین

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════
🌍 i18n و کوردی — ٢٠ پشکنین
═══════════════════════════════════════════════

Translation:
□ 1.  هەموو UI strings لە translation files ـدا (ckb, ar, en, tr)
□ 2.  هیچ hardcoded string لە components نییە
□ 3.  Pluralization rules correct (1 item vs 2+ items)
□ 4.  Date formatting locale-aware (Intl.DateTimeFormat)
□ 5.  Number formatting locale-aware (Intl.NumberFormat)

RTL:
□ 6.  dir attribute dynamic لەسەر <html>
□ 7.  lang attribute dynamic
□ 8.  Logical CSS properties تەنها (ms-, me-, ps-, pe-)
□ 9.  text-start/text-end نەک text-left/text-right
□ 10. start-/end- نەک left-/right-

Kurdish-Specific:
□ 11. NRT فۆنت loaded بۆ ckb
□ 12. Kurdish digits option (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩)
□ 13. IQD currency format: ١٢٣,٤٥٦ د.ع
□ 14. Phone format: ٠٧٥٠ ١٢٣ ٤٥٦٧
□ 15. Iraq cities list (Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, etc.)

Content:
□ 16. Bidirectional text handled (mixed Kurdish+English)
□ 17. Email templates RTL-safe
□ 18. PDF/receipt RTL-safe (ئەگەر هەبن)
□ 19. Search works with Kurdish characters
□ 20. Sorting Kurdish-aware (Unicode collation)

## 🔬 Advanced Audit Scenarios — سیناریۆی پشکنینی ئەدڤانس

### سیناریۆ ١: Race Condition لە Stock Management
```
📝 کێشە: دوو بەکارهێنەر هەمان کاتدا هەمان بەرهەمی دواهەمین
   دانە دەکڕن — دەبێت تەنها یەکێکیان بتوانێت بیکڕێت.

🔍 چۆن پشکنینی بکەم:

1. بخوێنەوە: src/app/api/checkout/route.ts
2. بگەڕێ بۆ:
   - ئایا stock check + decrement لە یەک transaction ـدا هەیە؟
   - ئایا SELECT FOR UPDATE بەکارهاتووە؟
   - ئایا optimistic locking (version column) هەیە؟

❌ ناسەلامەت:
```typescript
// Check stock
const { data: product } = await supabase
  .from('products')
  .select('stock')
  .eq('id', productId)
  .single()

if (product.stock < quantity) throw new Error('Out of stock')

// Decrement stock — RACE CONDITION! 
await supabase
  .from('products')
  .update({ stock: product.stock - quantity })
  .eq('id', productId)
```

✅ سەلامەت:
```typescript
// Atomic decrement — no race condition
const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('decrement_stock', {
  p_product_id: productId,
  p_quantity: quantity,
})
// RPC function checks AND decrements in one transaction
```

```sql
-- Supabase RPC function:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION decrement_stock(
  p_product_id UUID,
  p_quantity INT
) RETURNS BOOLEAN
LANGUAGE plpgsql
SECURITY DEFINER
AS $$
DECLARE
  current_stock INT;
BEGIN
  -- Lock the row and get current stock
  SELECT stock INTO current_stock
  FROM products
  WHERE id = p_product_id
  FOR UPDATE;
  
  IF current_stock < p_quantity THEN
    RETURN FALSE; -- Not enough stock
  END IF;
  
  UPDATE products
  SET stock = stock - p_quantity
  WHERE id = p_product_id;
  
  RETURN TRUE;
END;
$$;
```
```

### سیناریۆ ٢: XSS لە Product Description
```
📝 کێشە: ئەگەر admin HTML لە product description بنووسێت
   و ئەم HTML ـە بەبێ sanitization نیشان بدرێت...

🔍 چۆن پشکنینی بکەم:

1. بگەڕێ: grep -rn "dangerouslySetInnerHTML" src/
2. بگەڕێ: grep -rn "innerHTML" src/
3. بخوێنەوە: Product detail page
4. بخوێنەوە: Admin product editor

❌ ناسەلامەت:
```tsx
// Product page — XSS vulnerability!
<div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: product.description }} />
```

✅ سەلامەت — Option A (no HTML):
```tsx
// Simply display as text — React auto-escapes
<p className="whitespace-pre-wrap">{product.description}</p>
```

✅ سەلامەت — Option B (with HTML, sanitized):
```tsx
import DOMPurify from 'isomorphic-dompurify'

const cleanHTML = DOMPurify.sanitize(product.description, {
  ALLOWED_TAGS: ['p', 'br', 'strong', 'em', 'ul', 'ol', 'li', 'h2', 'h3'],
  ALLOWED_ATTR: ['class'],
})

<div dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: cleanHTML }} />
```
```

### سیناریۆ ٣: IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference) لە Orders
```
📝 کێشە: بەکارهێنەر A دەتوانێت order ـی بەکارهێنەر B
   ببینێت بە گۆڕینی order ID لە URL ـدا.

🔍 چۆن پشکنینی بکەم:

1. بخوێنەوە: src/app/(store)/orders/[id]/page.tsx
2. بگەڕێ: ئایا user_id check هەیە پێش نیشاندان؟

❌ ناسەلامەت:
```typescript
// Anyone can view any order by ID!
const { data: order } = await supabase
  .from('orders')
  .select('*')
  .eq('id', params.id)
  .single()
```

✅ سەلامەت — Option A (RLS):
```typescript
// RLS policy automatically filters by user_id
// CREATE POLICY "Users see own orders" ON orders
//   FOR SELECT USING (auth.uid() = user_id)
const { data: order } = await supabase
  .from('orders')
  .select('*')
  .eq('id', params.id)
  .single()
// RLS ensures user can only see their own orders ✅
```

✅ سەلامەت — Option B (explicit check):
```typescript
const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
const { data: order } = await supabase
  .from('orders')
  .select('*')
  .eq('id', params.id)
  .eq('user_id', user!.id)  // explicit ownership check
  .single()

if (!order) notFound()
```

✅ ئەگەر admin ـیش هەبێت:
```typescript
const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
const { data: profile } = await supabase
  .from('profiles')
  .select('role')
  .eq('id', user!.id)
  .single()

const query = supabase
  .from('orders')
  .select('*')
  .eq('id', params.id)

// Admin can see all, users see own only
if (profile?.role !== 'admin') {
  query.eq('user_id', user!.id)
}

const { data: order } = await query.single()
```
```

### سیناریۆ ٤: Cart Manipulation — Client-Side Price Tampering
```
📝 کێشە: بەکارهێنەر دەتوانێت نرخی کاڵا لە client-side
   بگۆڕێت و بە نرخی کەم بیکڕێت.

🔍 چۆن پشکنینی بکەم:

1. بخوێنەوە: src/store/cart.ts — ئایا price لە cart state ـدا save ـە؟
2. بخوێنەوە: src/app/api/checkout/route.ts — ئایا price لە client وەردەگرێت؟

❌ ناسەلامەت:
```typescript
// API route trusts client-sent prices!
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const { items } = await request.json()
  // items = [{ productId: '...', quantity: 2, price: 0.01 }]
  //                                          ^^^^^^^^ tampered!
  
  const total = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0)
  
  const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
    line_items: items.map(item => ({
      price_data: {
        unit_amount: Math.round(item.price * 100), // 🚨 TAMPERED PRICE!
      }
    }))
  })
}
```

✅ سەلامەت:
```typescript
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const { items } = await request.json()
  // items = [{ productId: '...', quantity: 2 }]
  //          ← NO PRICE FROM CLIENT!
  
  // Query real prices from database
  const productIds = items.map(i => i.productId)
  const { data: products } = await adminSupabase
    .from('products')
    .select('id, price, stock, name')
    .in('id', productIds)
  
  // Verify stock availability
  for (const item of items) {
    const product = products?.find(p => p.id === item.productId)
    if (!product) throw new Error(`Product ${item.productId} not found`)
    if (product.stock < item.quantity) throw new Error(`Insufficient stock: ${product.name}`)
  }
  
  // Calculate total with SERVER prices
  const total = items.reduce((sum, item) => {
    const product = products!.find(p => p.id === item.productId)!
    return sum + product.price * item.quantity
  }, 0)
  
  // Create Stripe session with verified prices
  const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
    line_items: items.map(item => {
      const product = products!.find(p => p.id === item.productId)!
      return {
        price_data: {
          currency: 'usd',
          unit_amount: Math.round(product.price * 100), // ✅ DB PRICE!
          product_data: { name: product.name },
        },
        quantity: item.quantity,
      }
    })
  })
}
```
```

### سیناریۆ ٥: Webhook Replay Attack
```
📝 کێشە: هاکەر دەتوانێت webhook ـی سەرکەوتوو لە
   Stripe duplicate بکات بۆ ئەوەی order دووبارە process
   بکرێت — double delivery, inventory مەسەلە.

🔍 چۆن پشکنینی بکەم:

1. بخوێنەوە: src/app/api/webhook/route.ts
2. بگەڕێ: ئایا idempotency check هەیە؟

❌ ناسەلامەت:
```typescript
// No replay protection!
case 'checkout.session.completed': {
  const session = event.data.object
  // Always processes, even if replayed
  await adminSupabase
    .from('orders')
    .update({ status: 'paid', paid_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq('stripe_session_id', session.id)
  
  // Send email — will send AGAIN on replay!
  await sendOrderConfirmation(session.metadata!.orderId)
}
```

✅ سەلامەت:
```typescript
case 'checkout.session.completed': {
  const session = event.data.object
  
  // 1. Check if already processed — IDEMPOTENT
  const { data: order } = await adminSupabase
    .from('orders')
    .select('id, status')
    .eq('stripe_session_id', session.id)
    .single()
  
  if (!order) {
    console.error('Order not found for session:', session.id)
    break // Don't fail — return 200
  }
  
  if (order.status !== 'pending') {
    console.log('Order already processed:', order.id, order.status)
    break // Already processed — skip (idempotent)
  }
  
  // 2. Process only pending orders
  await adminSupabase
    .from('orders')
    .update({ status: 'paid', paid_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq('id', order.id)
    .eq('status', 'pending') // Double-check with WHERE clause
  
  // 3. Send notifications with error isolation
  await Promise.allSettled([
    sendOrderConfirmation(order.id),
    createAdminNotification(order.id),
    decrementStock(order.id),
  ])
}
```
```
